## 7. PRISMA SCHEMA (Database)

### Models Overview

```
User (OAuth identity)
  ├── Player (golf profile) [1:1]
  │   ├── Round (golf rounds) [1:N]
  │   │   ├── Course (optional) [N:1]
  │   │   └── RoundLink (playing partners) [N:N via Junction]
  │   └── RoundLink (as source/target) [N:N]
  └── UserRole (RBAC) [N:N]

Role
  └── UserRole [N:N]

Course
  └── Round [1:N]

RoundLink (junction for playing partners)
  ├── sourceRound
  ├── targetRound
  └── createdBy (User who linked)

AuditLog
  └── Independent logging
```

### Model Details

#### User
```typescript
id: String @id @default(uuid())
email: String @unique
firstName: String
lastName: String
provider: String              // 'google'
providerId: String
@@unique([provider, providerId])
avatarUrl: String?
locale: String?
emailVerified: Boolean @default(false)
hostedDomain: String?         // For domain-based filtering
lastLoginAt: DateTime?
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt: DateTime @updatedAt
player: Player?
userRoles: UserRole[]
```

#### Player
```typescript
id: String @id @default(uuid())
firstName: String
lastName: String
ghinNumber: String?           // GHIN identifier
handicap: Float?              // Golf handicap
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
userId: String @unique
user: User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
rounds: Round[]
```

#### Round
```typescript
id: String @id @default(uuid())
date: DateTime @default(now())
courseName: String?           // Deprecated: kept for migration
courseId: String?             // New: reference to Course
strokes: Int
front9: Int?
back9: Int?
playingPartners: String?      // Manual text entry
teeTime: DateTime?            // For auto-linking
latitude: Float?              // GPS coordinate
longitude: Float?
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
notes: String?
deletedAt: DateTime?          // Soft delete support

// Advanced Golf Stats (12 fields)
girPct: Float?                // Greens in Regulation %
firPct: Float?                // Fairways in Regulation %
approachPct: Float?
front9Putts: Int?
back9Putts: Int?
totalPutts: Int?
holeInOnes: Int?
eagles: Int?
birdies: Int?
pars: Int?
bogeys: Int?
doubleBogeys: Int?
triplePlusBogeys: Int?

playerId: String
player: Player @relation(fields: [playerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
course: Course? @relation(fields: [courseId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
linkedFrom: RoundLink[] @relation("SourceRound")
linkedTo: RoundLink[] @relation("TargetRound")

@@index([playerId, date])
@@index([playerId, deletedAt])
@@index([courseId])
@@index([courseId, date, teeTime])
```

#### Course
```typescript
id: String @id @default(uuid())
name: String
city: String?
state: String?
country: String?
zipCode: String?
totalPar: Int?
front9Par: Int?               // Front 9 par
back9Par: Int?                // Back 9 par
courseRating: Float?
slopeRating: Int?
apiCourseId: Int? @unique     // Golf API integration
apiData: Json?                // Complete API response cache
latitude: Float?
longitude: Float?
lastSynced: DateTime @default(now())
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt: DateTime @updatedAt
rounds: Round[]

@@index([name])
@@index([city, state])
@@index([latitude, longitude])
```

#### RoundLink
```typescript
id: String @id @default(uuid())
sourceRoundId: String
targetRoundId: String
linkType: String @default("playing_partner")
status: String @default("pending")    // pending, confirmed, rejected
createdBy: String            // User ID who created link
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt: DateTime @updatedAt

sourceRound: Round @relation("SourceRound", fields: [sourceRoundId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
targetRound: Round @relation("TargetRound", fields: [targetRoundId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

@@unique([sourceRoundId, targetRoundId])
@@index([sourceRoundId])
@@index([targetRoundId])
@@index([status])
```

#### Role & UserRole
```typescript
// Role
id: String @id @default(uuid())
name: String @unique          // 'admin', 'user'
description: String?
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())
userRoles: UserRole[]

// UserRole
id: String @id @default(uuid())
userId: String
roleId: String
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())

user: User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
role: Role @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

@@unique([userId, roleId])
@@index([userId])
@@index([roleId])
```

#### AuditLog
```typescript
id: String @id @default(uuid())
userId: String                // Who performed action
action: String                // LOGIN, LOGOUT, CREATE_ROUND, etc.
resource: String?             // Round:uuid, Profile:uuid
metadata: Json?               // Additional context
createdAt: DateTime @default(now())

@@index([userId, createdAt])
@@index([action, createdAt])
```

### Database Indices

**Optimized for:**
- User round lookups: `(playerId, date)`
- Soft delete queries: `(playerId, deletedAt)`
- Course lookups: `(courseId)`
- Round matching: `(courseId, date, teeTime)`
- Course searches: `(name)`, `(city, state)`, `(latitude, longitude)`
- Audit queries: `(userId, createdAt)`, `(action, createdAt)`

## 8. GUARDS & MIDDLEWARE

### JwtAuthGuard (`src/auth/jwt-auth.guard.ts`)

```typescript
@Injectable()
export class JwtAuthGuard extends AuthGuard('jwt') {}
```

**Function:** Protects routes by verifying JWT from `lg_jwt` cookie
**Usage:** `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)`
**Error:** 401 Unauthorized if token missing/invalid

### CsrfGuard (`src/auth/csrf.guard.ts`)

**Protection:** Double-submit cookie CSRF pattern

**Algorithm:**
1. Extract `csrf_token` cookie
2. Extract `X-CSRF-Token` header
3. Compare with constant-time comparison
4. Skip for GET/HEAD/OPTIONS

**Prevent:** Timing attacks with bitwise comparison

**Error:** 403 Forbidden if mismatch

### AdminGuard (`src/auth/admin.guard.ts`)

**Function:** Verifies user has 'admin' role via UserRole junction
**Admin Email:** info@lazygolfing.com (hardcoded in AuthService)
**Logging:** Warns on failed admin access attempts
**Error:** 403 Forbidden if not admin

### Throttler (Rate Limiting)

**Global Limits:**
- Default: 120 requests/minute per IP
- Auth: 20 requests/minute
- Session: 20 requests/minute

**Implementation:** `@nestjs/throttler` with APP_GUARD

---

## 9. SECURITY FEATURES

### Authentication
- **Method:** Google OAuth 2.0 via Passport
- **Token:** JWT with `sub` (user ID) and `email` claims
- **Storage:** HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite cookie (`lg_jwt`)
- **Expiration:** 7 days
- **Validation:** Verified on every protected route

### Authorization
- **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)** via User/Role junction table
- **Admin detection:** Email-based (info@lazygolfing.com)
- **Scope:** Per-user data isolation enforced in services

### CSRF Protection
- **Pattern:** Double-submit cookie
- **Token:** Random 32-char hex string
- **Flow:** Generated at login, sent in X-CSRF-Token header
- **Comparison:** Constant-time to prevent timing attacks

### Validation
- **DTO validation:** class-validator decorators
- **Constraints:**
  - Strokes: 18-200
  - Handicap: -10 to 54
  - GIR/FIR/Approach: 0-100%
  - Putts: 0-50 per 9 holes

### Security Headers (Helmet)

```
Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self', styleSrc 'self' 'unsafe-inline', etc.
HSTS: max-age=31536000 (1 year)
X-Frame-Options: deny (prevent clickjacking)
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
```

### Input Sanitization
- Whitelist mode: forbidNonWhitelisted in ValidationPipe
- Transformation: enableImplicitConversion
- Trim: Applied to string fields
- Null coercion: Empty strings → null for optional fields

### Soft Deletes
- **Implementation:** `deletedAt: DateTime?` on Round
- **Queries:** Always filter `deletedAt: null`
- **GDPR:** Account deletion cascades to all user data

## 10. CONFIGURATION

### nest-cli.json
```json
{
  "collection": "@nestjs/schematics",
  "sourceRoot": "src",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "deleteOutDir": true
  }
}
```

### tsconfig.json

**Key Settings:**
- `module: "nodenext"`, `target: "ES2023"`
- `strict: true` (all strict checks enabled)
- `skipLibCheck: true` (faster compilation)
- `noFallthroughCasesInSwitch: true`
- `emitDecoratorMetadata: true`, `experimentalDecorators: true`

### main.ts Bootstrap

```typescript
// Helmet security headers
// CORS: lazygolfing.com, www.lazygolfing.com, CDN
// Cookie parser for lg_jwt
// JSON body limit: 1MB (prevent large payload attacks)
// ValidationPipe: whitelist + transform
// Listen: 0.0.0.0:3000 (all interfaces)
```

### Environment Variables

**Required:**
- `DATABASE_URL` - PostgreSQL connection string
- `JWT_SECRET` - At least 32 characters (openssl rand -base64 32)
- `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` - From Google Cloud Console
- `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET` - From Google Cloud Console
- `GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL` - OAuth redirect URL
- `FRONTEND_URL` - Frontend origin for redirects
- `NODE_ENV` - development/production/test
- `PORT` - Server port (3000)

**Validation:**
- `env.validation.ts` validates all vars at startup
- Custom validators check formats (email domains, URL prefixes, port ranges)
- Fails fast with helpful error messages

**Coverage:**

- Request/response validation
- Error handling

---

## 12. API DOCUMENTATION

### Authentication Flow

```
1. Frontend: GET /auth/google
2. Browser → Google OAuth consent screen
3. Google → Backend: /auth/google/redirect?code=...
4. Backend:
   a. Exchange code for user info
   b. Upsert User + Player
   c. Ensure roles (admin if email === info@lazygolfing.com)
   d. Create JWT
   e. Set lg_jwt & csrf_token cookies
   f. Redirect to https://lazygolfing.com/profile
5. Frontend: GET /auth/session to confirm
```

### Cookie Configuration

```typescript
{
  httpOnly: true,                    // XSS protection
  secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',  // HTTPS only
  sameSite: isProd ? 'none' : 'lax',  // Cross-origin in prod
  domain: isProd ? '.lazygolfing.com' : undefined,
  path: '/',
  maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000   // 7 days
}
```

### Standard Response Format

**Success:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "data": {...}
}
```

**Errors:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 400,
  "message": "Invalid input",
  "error": "Bad Request"
}
```

### Common Status Codes

| Code | Meaning | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| 200 | Success | GET /v1/me |
| 204 | No Content | POST /auth/logout |
| 400 | Bad Request | Invalid DTO |
| 401 | Unauthorized | Missing/invalid JWT |
| 403 | Forbidden | CSRF token mismatch, Admin-only, Role check failed |
| 404 | Not Found | Round/Course/User not found |
| 409 | Conflict | Course name already exists |
| 429 | Too Many Requests | Rate limit exceeded |
| 500 | Server Error | Unhandled exception |

---

## 13. TECHNICAL DEBT & NOTES

### Known Items

1. **courseName Deprecation** - Kept for migration, prefer courseId
2. **Golf API Integration** - Currently in courses.service, could be extracted to separate service
3. **Playing Partners Matching** - GPS window (0.001 degrees) is rough; could use proper Haversine
4. **Audit Logging** - Non-blocking (catch errors), could miss logs under high load
5. **Test Coverage** - Core services have tests; some edge cases may not be covered

### Future Enhancements

- Admin dashboard for audit log queries
- Notification system for round linking
- Calendar integration for tee times
- Advanced stats export (CSV/PDF)
- League/tournament management endpoints
- Performance optimization for large datasets

---

## Summary

The Lazy Golfing backend is a well-structured NestJS API with:

✅ **Strengths:**
- Clean modular architecture following NestJS patterns
- Comprehensive security (OAuth, JWT, CSRF, rate limiting)
- Flexible golf round tracking with advanced stats
- GDPR-compliant (data export, account deletion)
- Audit logging for compliance
- Course management with Golf API integration
- Round linking for playing partner tracking
- Soft deletes for data preservation

✅ **Technologies:**
- NestJS 11 + TypeScript 5.9
- PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM
- Passport.js for OAuth/JWT
- class-validator for input validation
- Jest for testing

✅ **Ready for Production:**
- Environment validation
- Error handling & logging
- Rate limiting & CORS
- Helmet security headers
- PM2 process management configuration

This codebase provides a solid foundation for a community golf platform with room for growth in league management, advanced analytics, and integrations.

  - JwtStrategy: JWT validation strategy
  - JwtAuthGuard: Route protection decorator
  - AdminGuard: Role-based access control

#### **ProfileModule**
- **Location:** `src/profile/`
- **Purpose:** User profile management & statistics

#### **CoursesModule**
- **Location:** `src/courses/`

#### **AuditLogModule**

#### **PrismaModule**

- Double-submit CSRF token pattern

## 5. SERVICES & RESPONSIBILITIES

### AuthService (`src/auth/auth.service.ts`)

**Methods:**
- `validateOrCreateOAuthUser(oauth: OAuthUser)` - Upsert user/player on login
- `ensureUserRoles(userId: string, email: string)` - RBAC assignment
- `createToken(user: User)` - Issue JWT
- `verifyToken(token: string)` - Parse & validate JWT

**Responsibilities:**
- OAuth user provisioning
- Role-based access control (admin detection by email)
- JWT lifecycle management
- Audit logging for authentication events

### ProfileService (`src/profile/profile.service.ts`)

**Methods:**
- `getMe(userId: string)` - Fetch user + player profile
- `updateMe(userId: string, dto: UpdateProfileDto)` - Update profile fields
- `getStats(userId: string)` - Calculate user statistics
- `exportUserData(userId: string)` - GDPR data export
- `deleteUserAccount(userId: string)` - Account deletion with cascade

**Statistics Calculated:**
- Total rounds, average score, best/worst scores
- Recent rounds (5 most recent)
- Most played courses
- Score trend (chronologically sorted)

### RoundsService (`src/rounds/rounds.service.ts`)

**Methods:**
- `listByUser(userId, options)` - Paginated round listing with partner links
- `createForUser(userId, data)` - Create single round
- `updateRound(userId, roundId, data)` - Update round fields
- `softDeleteRound(userId, roundId)` - Soft delete (sets deletedAt)
- `findPotentialMatches(roundId, userId)` - Find partner matches (time/GPS)
- `linkRounds(userId, sourceId, targetId)` - Create round link
- `getLinkedRounds(roundId, userId)` - Fetch linked rounds
- `getPlayingPartners(userId)` - Aggregate all partners with stats

**Round Matching Algorithm:**
- Time-based: ±30 minutes from tee time
- GPS-based: ~111 meters (0.001 degrees)
- Course-based: courseId or courseName match
- Excludes already-linked rounds

**Advanced Statistics Support:**
- GIR%, FIR%, approach accuracy
- Putting stats (front 9, back 9, total)
- Scoring breakdown (eagles, birdies, pars, bogeys, etc.)

### CoursesService (`src/courses/courses.service.ts`)

**Methods:**
- `search(query, limit)` - Local fuzzy search (case-insensitive)
- `getMostPopular(limit)` - Most played courses
- `create(userId, data)` - Create new course
- `list(page, limit)` - Paginated course list
- `getById(courseId)` - Course details + statistics
- `update(courseId, userId, data)` - Update course (admin)
- `delete(courseId, userId)` - Delete course (admin)
- `fetchCoursesFromApi(page)` - Fetch from Golf Course API
- `transformApiCourse(apiCourse)` - Convert API data to schema
- `importCourseFromApi(apiCourseId, userId)` - Import by API ID
- `searchWithApi(query, includeApi, limit)` - Hybrid local + API search
- `getNearby(lat, lon, limit)` - Haversine distance calculation

**Distance Calculation:**
- Uses Haversine formula for GPS distance
- Returns distances in miles
- Filters courses with valid coordinates

### AuditLogService (`src/audit-log/audit-log.service.ts`)

**Methods:**
- `log(userId, action, resource, metadata)` - Create audit entry
- `getUserLogs(userId, limit)` - User action history
- `getLogsByAction(action, limit)` - Action-based queries
- `cleanupOldLogs(olderThanDays)` - Retention policy enforcement

**Audit Actions (Enum):**
- AUTH: LOGIN, LOGOUT, AUTH_FAILED
- PROFILE: PROFILE_UPDATED, PROFILE_VIEWED
- ROUNDS: ROUND_CREATED, ROUND_UPDATED, ROUND_VIEWED, ROUND_DELETED
- COURSES: COURSE_CREATED, COURSE_UPDATED, COURSE_DELETED
- ACCOUNT: ACCOUNT_DELETED, DATA_EXPORTED

### PrismaService (`src/prisma/prisma.service.ts`)

**Features:**
- Extends PrismaClient
- Lazy connection on module init
- Graceful disconnection on module destroy
- Masked database URL logging (security)

---

## 6. DATA TRANSFER OBJECTS (DTOs)

### UpdateProfileDto (`src/profile/update-profile.dto.ts`)

```typescript
class UpdateProfileDto {
  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  firstName?: string;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  lastName?: string;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  ghinNumber?: string;              // Empty string → null on server

  @IsOptional()
  @Type(() => Number)
  @IsNumber()
  @Min(-10)
  @Max(54)
  handicap?: number | null;
}
```

### CreateRoundDto (`src/rounds/dto/create-round.dto.ts`)

```typescript
class CreateRoundDto {
  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  courseId?: string;                 // Preferred: Course model FK

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  @MaxLength(100)
  courseName?: string;               // Fallback: string name

  @IsNumber()
  @Min(18)
  @Max(200)
  strokes!: number;                  // Required: total strokes

  @IsOptional()
  @IsNumber()
  @Min(9)
  @Max(100)
  front9?: number;                   // Optional: front 9 score

  @IsOptional()
  @IsNumber()
  @Min(9)
  @Max(100)
  back9?: number;                    // Optional: back 9 score

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  @MaxLength(200)
  playingPartners?: string;          // CSV list of names

  @IsOptional()
  @IsDateString()
  date?: string;                     // ISO date

  @IsOptional()
  @IsDateString()
  teeTime?: string;                  // ISO datetime (for matching)

  @IsOptional()
  @IsNumber()
  @Min(-90)
  @Max(90)
  latitude?: number;                 // GPS coordinate

  @IsOptional()
  @IsNumber()
  @Min(-180)
  @Max(180)
  longitude?: number;                // GPS coordinate

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  @MaxLength(500)
  notes?: string;                    // Round notes

  // Advanced Stats (12 fields)
  girPct?, firPct?, approachPct?     // Performance percentages
  front9Putts?, back9Putts?, totalPutts?  // Putting stats
  holeInOnes?, eagles?, birdies?, pars?, bogeys?, doubleBogeys?, triplePlusBogeys?
}
```

## 7. PRISMA SCHEMA (Database)

### Models Overview

```
User (OAuth identity)
  ├── Player (golf profile) [1:1]
  │   ├── Round (golf rounds) [1:N]
  │   │   ├── Course (optional) [N:1]
  │   │   └── RoundLink (playing partners) [N:N via Junction]
  │   └── RoundLink (as source/target) [N:N]
  └── UserRole (RBAC) [N:N]

Role
  └── UserRole [N:N]

Course
  └── Round [1:N]

RoundLink (junction for playing partners)
  ├── sourceRound
  ├── targetRound
  └── createdBy (User who linked)

AuditLog
  └── Independent logging
```

### Model Details

#### User

linkedTo: RoundLink[] @relation("TargetRound")

@@index([playerId, date])

## 8. GUARDS & MIDDLEWARE

### JwtAuthGuard (`src/auth/jwt-auth.guard.ts`)

```typescript
@Injectable()
export class JwtAuthGuard extends AuthGuard('jwt') {}
```

**Function:** Protects routes by verifying JWT from `lg_jwt` cookie
**Usage:** `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)`
**Error:** 401 Unauthorized if token missing/invalid

### CsrfGuard (`src/auth/csrf.guard.ts`)

**Protection:** Double-submit cookie CSRF pattern

**Algorithm:**
1. Extract `csrf_token` cookie
2. Extract `X-CSRF-Token` header
3. Compare with constant-time comparison
4. Skip for GET/HEAD/OPTIONS

**Prevent:** Timing attacks with bitwise comparison

**Error:** 403 Forbidden if mismatch

### AdminGuard (`src/auth/admin.guard.ts`)

**Function:** Verifies user has 'admin' role via UserRole junction
**Admin Email:** info@lazygolfing.com (hardcoded in AuthService)
**Logging:** Warns on failed admin access attempts
**Error:** 403 Forbidden if not admin

### Throttler (Rate Limiting)

**Global Limits:**
- Default: 120 requests/minute per IP
- Auth: 20 requests/minute
- Session: 20 requests/minute

**Implementation:** `@nestjs/throttler` with APP_GUARD

---

## 9. SECURITY FEATURES

### Authentication
- **Method:** Google OAuth 2.0 via Passport
- **Token:** JWT with `sub` (user ID) and `email` claims
- **Storage:** HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite cookie (`lg_jwt`)
- **Expiration:** 7 days
- **Validation:** Verified on every protected route

### Authorization
- **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)** via User/Role junction table
- **Admin detection:** Email-based (info@lazygolfing.com)
- **Scope:** Per-user data isolation enforced in services

### CSRF Protection
- **Pattern:** Double-submit cookie
- **Token:** Random 32-char hex string
- **Flow:** Generated at login, sent in X-CSRF-Token header
- **Comparison:** Constant-time to prevent timing attacks

### Validation
- **DTO validation:** class-validator decorators
- **Constraints:**
  - Strokes: 18-200
  - Handicap: -10 to 54
  - GIR/FIR/Approach: 0-100%
  - Putts: 0-50 per 9 holes

### Security Headers (Helmet)

```
Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self', styleSrc 'self' 'unsafe-inline', etc.
HSTS: max-age=31536000 (1 year)
X-Frame-Options: deny (prevent clickjacking)
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
```

### Input Sanitization
- Whitelist mode: forbidNonWhitelisted in ValidationPipe
- Transformation: enableImplicitConversion
- Trim: Applied to string fields
- Null coercion: Empty strings → null for optional fields

### Soft Deletes
- **Implementation:** `deletedAt: DateTime?` on Round
- **Queries:** Always filter `deletedAt: null`
- **GDPR:** Account deletion cascades to all user data

## 12. API DOCUMENTATION

### Authentication Flow

```
1. Frontend: GET /auth/google
2. Browser → Google OAuth consent screen
3. Google → Backend: /auth/google/redirect?code=...
4. Backend:
   a. Exchange code for user info
   b. Upsert User + Player
   c. Ensure roles (admin if email === info@lazygolfing.com)
   d. Create JWT
   e. Set lg_jwt & csrf_token cookies
   f. Redirect to https://lazygolfing.com/profile
5. Frontend: GET /auth/session to confirm
```

### Cookie Configuration

```typescript
{
  httpOnly: true,                    // XSS protection
  secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',  // HTTPS only
  sameSite: isProd ? 'none' : 'lax',  // Cross-origin in prod
  domain: isProd ? '.lazygolfing.com' : undefined,
  path: '/',
  maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000   // 7 days
}
```

### Standard Response Format

**Success:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "data": {...}
}
```

**Errors:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 400,
  "message": "Invalid input",
  "error": "Bad Request"
}
```

### Common Status Codes

| Code | Meaning | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| 200 | Success | GET /v1/me |
| 204 | No Content | POST /auth/logout |
| 400 | Bad Request | Invalid DTO |
| 401 | Unauthorized | Missing/invalid JWT |
| 403 | Forbidden | CSRF token mismatch, Admin-only, Role check failed |
| 404 | Not Found | Round/Course/User not found |
| 409 | Conflict | Course name already exists |
| 429 | Too Many Requests | Rate limit exceeded |
| 500 | Server Error | Unhandled exception |

## 6. ALL COMPONENTS

### Layout Components (`src/components/layout/`)

#### Header.tsx
- **Type:** Client component (`'use client'`)
- **Purpose:** Navigation header with logo, nav links, theme toggle
- **Features:**
  - Sticky positioning (z-50)
  - Responsive design (desktop nav hidden on mobile)
  - Navigation links array (Rounds, Leagues, Tournaments, Courses, Players)
  - Active link highlighting via `usePathname()`
  - Sign In / Get Started buttons
  - Theme toggle button
  - Uses `usePathname()` hook from Next.js
  
#### Footer.tsx
- **Type:** Server component
- **Purpose:** Footer with company info, links, and branding
- **Features:**
  - Multi-column layout (brand, platform, company, legal links)
  - Responsive grid (2 cols → 4 cols → 5 cols)
  - Copyright year (auto-calculated)
  - Theme toggle in footer
  - Link sections: Platform (Rounds, Leagues, etc.), Company (About, Contact), Legal (Privacy, Terms)

#### index.ts (Barrel Export)
- Exports: `Header`, `Footer`

### SEO Components (`src/components/seo/`)

#### JsonLd.tsx
- **Type:** Server component
- **Purpose:** Render JSON-LD schema.org structured data
- **Features:**
  - Uses Next.js `<Script>` component
  - Safe JSON stringification
  - Pre-built schemas included:
    - `websiteSchema` - WebSite schema for main site
    - `organizationSchema` - Organization schema
    - `sportsOrganizationSchema` - Sports organization
  - Factory functions:
    - `createBreadcrumbSchema(items)`
    - `createSportsEventSchema(options)`
    - `createGolfCourseSchema(options)`

#### index.ts (Barrel Export)
- Exports: `JsonLd`, `websiteSchema`, `organizationSchema`, `sportsOrganizationSchema`, factory functions

### UI Components (`src/components/ui/`)

#### button.tsx
- **Type:** Client component (forwardRef)
- **Purpose:** Reusable button component (shadcn/ui)
- **Variants:**
  - default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link
- **Sizes:**
  - default (h-9), sm (h-8), lg (h-10), icon (h-9 w-9)
- **Features:**
  - Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering
  - CVA (class-variance-authority) for variants
  - Supports `asChild` prop for custom rendering
  - Forward ref for direct DOM access

### Theme Components

#### theme-provider.tsx
- **Type:** Client component
- **Purpose:** Wrap app with next-themes provider
- **Configuration:**
  - attribute: "class" (toggles .dark class)
  - defaultTheme: "system" (respects OS preference)
  - enableSystem: true
  - disableTransitionOnChange: false

#### theme-toggle.tsx
- **Type:** Client component
- **Purpose:** Toggle between light and dark themes
- **Features:**
  - Sun/Moon icons from lucide-react
  - Hydration-safe (prevents mismatch)
  - Uses `useTheme()` hook
  - Accessibility attributes (aria-label)
  - Smooth transitions on icon hover

- Else use production `https://api.lazygolfing.com`

## KEY ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS

### 1. Single Source of Truth Pattern
- **Header/Footer:** Only in `src/app/layout.tsx`, never duplicated
- **Metadata:** Centralized in `src/lib/metadata.ts`
- **Colors:** Centralized in `src/lib/theme.ts`
- **SEO Schema:** Centralized in `src/components/seo/JsonLd.tsx`

### 2. Route Groups for Different Layouts
- `(auth)` group for login pages with minimal layout
- Main group for pages with full header/footer
- URL doesn't include group name: `/login` not `/(auth)/login`

### 3. Client vs Server Components
- Most components are server components (default)
- Client components marked with `'use client'`:
  - Header (uses usePathname)
  - ThemeToggle (uses useTheme)
  - ThemeProvider
  - LoginPage (uses useState, useEffect)

### 4. Metadata Factory Pattern
- `createMetadata()` for static pages
- `createDynamicMetadata()` for dynamic pages
- Automatic OpenGraph, Twitter Cards, canonical URLs

### 5. Component Composition
- Radix UI primitives for headless components
- shadcn/ui for pre-styled variants
- CVA (class-variance-authority) for variant management

---

### Static Export for Cloudflare Pages
- **Build Command:** `npm run build`
- **Output Directory:** `out/`
- **Root Directory:** `lzg.home`
- **Framework:** Next.js

### Output Structure
```
out/
├── index.html              # Home page
├── about/index.html        # About page
├── login/index.html        # Login page
├── alpha/                  # Legacy site
├── _next/                  # JS/CSS bundles
└── [other pages]/index.html
```

- **Light Mode:** Warm sunset tones (orange, coral, yellow)
- **Dark Mode:** Neon electric colors (pink, cyan, purple)
- Theme variables in `src/app/globals.css`

- `.gradient-text-sunset` - Orange → Coral → Pink

- `.neon-glow*` - Text glow effects
- `.glass` - Glass morphism background

## PERFORMANCE & OPTIMIZATION

- **Static Export:** No server required, pure CDN delivery
- **Image Optimization:** Disabled for static export (use external services)
- **Code Splitting:** Automatic via Next.js
- **CSS Purging:** Tailwind scans all source files
- **Font Optimization:** Next.js <optimized>Inter font

## SECURITY CONSIDERATIONS

- **HTTPS Only:** Production uses HTTPS
- **No Secrets:** No API keys in client code
- **JWT Cookies:** HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite
- **CSRF Protection:** Token sent in X-CSRF-Token header
- **JSON-LD:** Safe via JSON.stringify escaping

file.content:
# Lazy Golfing Platform Documentation

> Centralized documentation hub for the LazyGolfing platform

**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06

---

## Directory Structure

```
docs/
├── README.md                    # This file - documentation index
├── plans/                       # Product roadmaps and feature plans
│   ├── PRODUCT_ROADMAP.md      # Vision, features, timeline
│   └── PHASE_PLANS.md          # Detailed phase breakdowns
├── todo/                        # Task tracking and checklists
│   ├── MASTER_TODO.md          # Comprehensive task list
│   └── QUICK_WINS.md           # Low-effort, high-impact tasks
├── research/                    # Technical research and decisions
│   ├── API_INTEGRATIONS.md     # Third-party API research
│   └── TECHNOLOGY_DECISIONS.md # Architecture decision records
├── technical-debt/              # Code quality tracking
│   ├── DEBT_REGISTER.md        # Full technical debt inventory
│   └── DEBT_RESOLUTION_LOG.md  # Resolved debt tracking
├── architecture/                # System design documentation
│   ├── SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md      # High-level architecture
│   ├── DATABASE_SCHEMA.md      # Prisma schema documentation
│   └── API_REFERENCE.md        # Endpoint documentation
└── session-logs/                # Development session summaries
    └── [DATE]_SESSION.md       # Individual session progress
```

---

## Quick Links

### For Development
- [Master Todo List](./todo/MASTER_TODO.md) - What needs to be done
- [Technical Debt Register](./technical-debt/DEBT_REGISTER.md) - Code quality issues
- [API Reference](./architecture/API_REFERENCE.md) - Endpoint documentation

### For Planning
- [Product Roadmap](./plans/PRODUCT_ROADMAP.md) - Where we're going
- [Phase Plans](./plans/PHASE_PLANS.md) - How we'll get there

### For Architecture
- [System Overview](./architecture/SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md) - How it all works
- [Database Schema](./architecture/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md) - Data model documentation

---

## Related CLAUDE.md Files

The CLAUDE.md files provide AI-specific guidance for working with the codebase:

| Location | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `/CLAUDE.md` | Root monorepo overview, quick commands, critical rules |
| `/lzg.backend/CLAUDE.md` | Backend-specific: NestJS, Prisma, API endpoints |
| `/lzg.home/CLAUDE.md` | Frontend-specific: Next.js 15, React 19, Miami Vice theme |

---

## Document Maintenance

### Update Frequency
- **Todo lists**: Update as tasks complete
- **Technical debt**: Review monthly
- **Roadmap**: Review quarterly
- **Architecture**: Update when system changes

### Versioning
Documents include "Last Updated" dates. For significant changes, add a changelog section at the bottom of the document.

### Media Assets
Brand assets and archived planning materials are stored in:
- `/media/logos/` - Official Lazy Golfing logos and brand assets
- `/media/kikman/` - Kikman sub-brand assets
- `/media/archive/` - Archived planning screenshots and historical documents

**Note:** Legacy `.claude_plan` folders have been consolidated into `/media/archive/`.

---

## Contributing to Documentation

1. **Be concise** - Use bullet points and tables
2. **Be current** - Update timestamps when editing
3. **Be complete** - Include examples and context
4. **Be consistent** - Follow existing formatting patterns
5. **Cross-reference** - Link to related documents

---

*This documentation structure supports the "Lazy Golfing" platform development workflow.*

- [Product Roadmap](./plans/PRODUCT_ROADMAP.md) - Where we're going
- [Phase Plans](./plans/PHASE_PLANS.md) - How we'll get there

### For Architecture
- [System Overview](./architecture/SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md) - How it all works
- [Database Schema](./architecture/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md) - Data model documentation

---

## Related CLAUDE.md Files

The CLAUDE.md files provide AI-specific guidance for working with the codebase:

| Location | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `/CLAUDE.md` | Root monorepo overview, quick commands, critical rules |
| `/lzg.backend/CLAUDE.md` | Backend-specific: NestJS, Prisma, API endpoints |
| `/lzg.home/CLAUDE.md` | Frontend-specific: Next.js 15, React 19, Miami Vice theme |

---

## Document Maintenance

### Update Frequency
- **Todo lists**: Update as tasks complete
- **Technical debt**: Review monthly
- **Roadmap**: Review quarterly
- **Architecture**: Update when system changes

### Versioning
Documents include "Last Updated" dates. For significant changes, add a changelog section at the bottom of the document.

### Media Assets
Brand assets and archived planning materials are stored in:
- `/media/logos/` - Official Lazy Golfing logos and brand assets
- `/media/kikman/` - Kikman sub-brand assets
- `/media/archive/` - Archived planning screenshots and historical documents

**Note:** Legacy `.claude_plan` folders have been consolidated into `/media/archive/`.

---

## Contributing to Documentation

1. **Be concise** - Use bullet points and tables
2. **Be current** - Update timestamps when editing
3. **Be complete** - Include examples and context
4. **Be consistent** - Follow existing formatting patterns
5. **Cross-reference** - Link to related documents

---

*This documentation structure supports the "Lazy Golfing" platform development workflow.*

+- [Feature Roadmap](./plans/FEATURE_ROADMAP.md) - Comprehensive feature list by category

input.content:
# API Reference

> Complete endpoint documentation for the Lazy Golfing API

**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06
**Base URL (Production):** `https://api.lazygolfing.com`
**Base URL (Development):** `http://192.168.1.40:3000`

---

## Table of Contents

- [Authentication](#authentication)
- [Auth Endpoints](#auth-endpoints)
- [Profile Endpoints](#profile-endpoints)
- [Rounds Endpoints](#rounds-endpoints)
- [Courses Endpoints](#courses-endpoints)
- [Response Formats](#response-formats)
- [Error Codes](#error-codes)
- [Rate Limiting](#rate-limiting)

---

## Authentication

### Overview

The API uses **Google OAuth 2.0** for authentication and **JWT** for session management.

### Authentication Flow

```
1. Frontend: GET /auth/google
2. Browser redirects to Google OAuth consent screen
3. User grants permission
4. Google redirects to: /auth/google/redirect?code=...
5. Backend:
   a. Exchanges code for user info
   b. Creates/updates User + Player records
   c. Issues JWT token
   d. Sets cookies: lg_jwt (auth) + csrf_token (CSRF protection)
   e. Redirects to frontend success page
6. Frontend: GET /auth/session to confirm authentication
```

### Cookie Configuration

| Cookie | Type | Purpose | Expiration |
|--------|------|---------|------------|
| `lg_jwt` | HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite | JWT authentication token | 7 days |
| `csrf_token` | Secure, SameSite | CSRF double-submit token | 7 days |

### Protected Request Requirements

All protected endpoints require:
1. Valid `lg_jwt` cookie (automatically sent by browser)
2. `X-CSRF-Token` header matching `csrf_token` cookie value

```bash
# Example protected request
curl -X GET https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/me \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <token-from-csrf_token-cookie>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>"
```

---

## Auth Endpoints

### GET /auth/google

Initiates Google OAuth flow.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Response:** Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen

**Example:**
```bash
# Browser navigation
window.location.href = 'https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/google';
```

---

### GET /auth/google/redirect

OAuth callback endpoint (called by Google).

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `code` | string | Authorization code from Google |

**Response:** Redirects to frontend with cookies set

**Success Redirect:** `https://lazygolfing.com/profile`
**Error Redirect:** `https://lazygolfing.com/login?error=auth_failed`

---

### GET /auth/session

Check current authentication status.

**Authentication:** None (public)
**Rate Limit:** 20 requests/minute

**Response:**
```json
// Authenticated
{
  "authenticated": true,
  "user": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "name": "John Doe"
  }
}

// Not authenticated
{
  "authenticated": false
}
```

**Example:**
```bash
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>"
```

---

### POST /auth/logout

Clear authentication cookies.

**Authentication:** CSRF token required
**Rate Limit:** 20 requests/minute

**Headers:**
| Header | Required | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `X-CSRF-Token` | Yes | CSRF token from cookie |

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Example:**
```bash
curl -X POST https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/logout \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <csrf-token>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>"
```

---

## Profile Endpoints

### GET /v1/me

Fetch authenticated user's profile.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "displayName": "John Doe",
  "handicap": 15.2,
  "ghin": "1234567",
  "avatarUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...",
  "createdAt": "2025-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2025-12-01T14:22:00.000Z"
}
```

---

### PUT /v1/me

Update authenticated user's profile.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "firstName": "John",        // optional, string
  "lastName": "Doe",          // optional, string
  "ghinNumber": "1234567",    // optional, string (empty string → null)
  "handicap": 15.2            // optional, number (-10 to 54) or null
}
```

**Validation:**
| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `firstName` | string | Optional |
| `lastName` | string | Optional |
| `ghinNumber` | string | Optional, empty string clears value |
| `handicap` | number/null | Optional, range: -10 to 54 |

**Response:** Updated profile object (same as GET /v1/me)

---

### GET /v1/me/stats

Fetch user's golf statistics.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:**
```json
{
  "totalRounds": 42,
  "averageScore": 87.5,
  "bestScore": 78,
  "worstScore": 102,
  "recentRounds": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "date": "2025-12-01",
      "courseName": "Pebble Beach",
      "strokes": 85
    }
  ],
  "mostPlayedCourses": [
    {
      "name": "Local Muni",
      "count": 15
    }
  ],
  "scoreTrend": [85, 88, 82, 86, 84]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/me/playing-partners

Fetch aggregated playing partner statistics.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:**
```json
{
  "partners": [
    {
      "name": "Jane Smith",
      "roundsTogether": 12,
      "lastPlayed": "2025-12-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/me/export

Export all user data (GDPR compliance).

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:** JSON file download containing all user data

---

### DELETE /v1/me

Delete user account and all associated data.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Note:** This action is irreversible. All rounds, profile data, and linked records will be permanently deleted.

---

## Rounds Endpoints

### GET /v1/rounds

List authenticated user's rounds.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `limit` | number | 20 | Results per page (max: 100) |
| `offset` | number | 0 | Pagination offset |
| `sortBy` | string | `date` | Sort field: `date`, `courseName`, `strokes`, `createdAt` |
| `sortOrder` | string | `desc` | Sort direction: `asc`, `desc` |
| `search` | string | - | Filter by course name (partial match) |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "rounds": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "date": "2025-12-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "courseName": "Pebble Beach",
      "courseId": "course-uuid",
      "strokes": 85,
      "front9": 42,
      "back9": 43,
      "playingPartners": "John, Jane",
      "teeTime": "2025-12-01T08:30:00.000Z",
      "latitude": 36.5672,
      "longitude": -121.9486,
      "notes": "Great weather!",
      "girPct": 55.5,
      "firPct": 64.3,
      "totalPutts": 32,
      "birdies": 2,
      "pars": 8,
      "bogeys": 6,
      "linkedRounds": [
        {
          "id": "link-uuid",
          "partnerName": "Jane Smith",
          "status": "confirmed"
        }
      ],
      "createdAt": "2025-12-01T18:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "total": 42,
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 0
}
```

---

### POST /v1/rounds

Create a new round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "courseId": "course-uuid",      // preferred: reference to Course
  "courseName": "Pebble Beach",   // fallback: string name
  "strokes": 85,                  // required: 18-200
  "front9": 42,                   // optional: 9-100
  "back9": 43,                    // optional: 9-100
  "playingPartners": "John, Jane", // optional: CSV names
  "date": "2025-12-01",           // optional: ISO date
  "teeTime": "2025-12-01T08:30:00.000Z", // optional: for matching
  "latitude": 36.5672,            // optional: GPS
  "longitude": -121.9486,         // optional: GPS
  "notes": "Great weather!",      // optional: max 500 chars

  // Advanced Stats (all optional)
  "girPct": 55.5,                 // 0-100
  "firPct": 64.3,                 // 0-100
  "approachPct": 45.0,            // 0-100
  "front9Putts": 15,              // 0-50
  "back9Putts": 17,               // 0-50
  "totalPutts": 32,               // 0-100
  "holeInOnes": 0,
  "eagles": 0,
  "birdies": 2,
  "pars": 8,
  "bogeys": 6,
  "doubleBogeys": 2,
  "triplePlusBogeys": 0
}
```

**Validation:**
| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `strokes` | number | Required, 18-200 |
| `front9` | number | Optional, 9-100 |
| `back9` | number | Optional, 9-100 |
| `courseName` | string | Optional, max 100 chars |
| `notes` | string | Optional, max 500 chars |
| `girPct`, `firPct`, `approachPct` | number | Optional, 0-100 |
| `latitude` | number | Optional, -90 to 90 |
| `longitude` | number | Optional, -180 to 180 |

**Response:** `201 Created` with created round object

---

### PUT /v1/rounds/:id

Update an existing round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Request Body:** Same as POST /v1/rounds (all fields optional)

**Response:** Updated round object

**Error:** `404 Not Found` if round doesn't exist or doesn't belong to user

---

### DELETE /v1/rounds/:id

Soft delete a round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Note:** Soft delete sets `deletedAt` timestamp. Data is preserved but hidden from queries.

---

### POST /v1/rounds/import-csv

Bulk import rounds from CSV data.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "rounds": [
    { "courseName": "Course 1", "strokes": 85, "date": "2025-12-01" },
    { "courseName": "Course 2", "strokes": 88, "date": "2025-11-28" }
  ]
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "imported": 2,
  "rounds": [/* created round objects */]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/rounds/:id/suggestions

Find potential playing partner matches.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Matching Algorithm:**
- **Time-based:** Within ±30 minutes of tee time
- **GPS-based:** Within ~111 meters (0.001 degrees)
- **Course-based:** Same courseId or courseName

**Response:**
```json
{
  "suggestions": [
    {
      "roundId": "uuid",
      "playerName": "Jane Smith",
      "courseName": "Pebble Beach",
      "date": "2025-12-01",
      "matchType": "time_and_location",
      "confidence": 0.95
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### POST /v1/rounds/:id/link/:targetId

Link two rounds as playing partners.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Source round ID |
| `targetId` | string (UUID) | Target round ID to link |

**Response:** Created link object

**Error:** `404 Not Found` if either round doesn't exist

---

### GET /v1/rounds/:id/linked

Get all rounds linked to this round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "linkedRounds": [
    {
      "linkId": "uuid",
      "round": { /* round object */ },
      "status": "confirmed",
      "linkType": "playing_partner"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## Courses Endpoints

### GET /v1/courses/search

Search courses by name.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `search` | string | - | Search query (required) |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results limit (1-100) |
| `includeApi` | boolean | false | Include Golf API results |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "courses": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Pebble Beach Golf Links",
      "city": "Pebble Beach",
      "state": "CA",
      "country": "USA",
      "totalPar": 72,
      "courseRating": 75.5,
      "slopeRating": 145,
      "source": "local"
    }
  ],
  "apiResults": [
    {
      "apiCourseId": 12345,
      "name": "Similar Course",
      "city": "Carmel",
      "state": "CA",
      "source": "api"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/courses/nearby

Find courses near GPS coordinates.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `lat` | number | Latitude (-90 to 90) |
| `lon` | number | Longitude (-180 to 180) |
| `limit` | number | Results limit (default: 10) |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "courses": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Local Course",
      "distance": 2.5,
      "distanceUnit": "miles"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/courses

List all courses.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 20 | Results per page |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "courses": [/* course objects */],
  "total": 150,
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20
}
```

---

### GET /v1/courses/:id

Get course details with statistics.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Course ID |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "name": "Pebble Beach Golf Links",
  "city": "Pebble Beach",
  "state": "CA",
  "country": "USA",
  "zipCode": "93953",
  "totalPar": 72,
  "front9Par": 36,
  "back9Par": 36,
  "courseRating": 75.5,
  "slopeRating": 145,
  "latitude": 36.5672,
  "longitude": -121.9486,
  "stats": {
    "totalRounds": 42,
    "averageScore": 89.2
  }
}
```

---

### POST /v1/courses

Create a new course.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "name": "New Course",         // required
  "city": "City Name",          // optional
  "state": "CA",                // optional
  "country": "USA",             // optional
  "totalPar": 72,               // optional
  "courseRating": 72.5,         // optional
  "slopeRating": 130            // optional
}
```

**Response:** `201 Created` with created course object

---

### POST /v1/courses/import

Import course from Golf API.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "apiCourseId": 12345
}
```

**Response:** Created course object with API data

---

### PUT /v1/courses/:id

Update course (admin only).

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF + Admin role required

**Request Body:** Same as POST /v1/courses (all fields optional)

**Response:** Updated course object

---

### DELETE /v1/courses/:id

Delete course (admin only).

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF + Admin role required

**Response:** `204 No Content`

---

## Response Formats

### Success Response

```json
{
  "data": { /* response data */ }
}
```

Or for collections:
```json
{
  "items": [/* array of items */],
  "total": 100,
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20
}
```

### Error Response

```json
{
  "statusCode": 400,
  "message": "Validation failed",
  "error": "Bad Request",
  "details": [
    {
      "field": "strokes",
      "message": "strokes must be between 18 and 200"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## Error Codes

| Status Code | Meaning | Common Causes |
|-------------|---------|---------------|
| 200 | Success | Request completed successfully |
| 201 | Created | Resource created successfully |
| 204 | No Content | Request completed, no body returned |
| 400 | Bad Request | Invalid input, validation failed |
| 401 | Unauthorized | Missing or invalid JWT token |
| 403 | Forbidden | CSRF token mismatch, insufficient permissions |
| 404 | Not Found | Resource doesn't exist or not owned by user |
| 409 | Conflict | Duplicate resource (e.g., course name) |
| 429 | Too Many Requests | Rate limit exceeded |
| 500 | Server Error | Unhandled exception |

---

## Rate Limiting

| Endpoint Category | Limit | Window |
|-------------------|-------|--------|
| Default | 120 requests | 1 minute |
| Authentication | 20 requests | 1 minute |
| Session check | 20 requests | 1 minute |

**Rate Limit Headers:**
```
X-RateLimit-Limit: 120
X-RateLimit-Remaining: 115
X-RateLimit-Reset: 1701432000
```

**Rate Limit Exceeded Response:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 429,
  "message": "ThrottlerException: Too Many Requests",
  "error": "Too Many Requests"
}
```

---

## Testing Examples

### Check Authentication Status
```bash
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session
```

### Get User Profile (Authenticated)
```bash
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/me \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <token>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>"
```

### Create a Round
```bash
curl -X POST https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/rounds \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <token>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>" \
  -d '{
    "courseName": "Local Muni",
    "strokes": 85,
    "date": "2025-12-06"
  }'
```

### Search Courses
```bash
curl "https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/courses/search?search=pebble&limit=5"
```

---

*This API reference is auto-generated from the NestJS backend codebase.*

### GET /auth/google/redirect

OAuth callback endpoint (called by Google).

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `code` | string | Authorization code from Google |

**Response:** Redirects to frontend with cookies set

**Success Redirect:** `https://lazygolfing.com/profile`
**Error Redirect:** `https://lazygolfing.com/login?error=auth_failed`

---

### GET /auth/session

Check current authentication status.

**Authentication:** None (public)
**Rate Limit:** 20 requests/minute

**Response:**
```json
// Authenticated
{
  "authenticated": true,
  "user": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "name": "John Doe"
  }
}

// Not authenticated
{
  "authenticated": false
}
```

**Example:**
```bash
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>"
```

---

### POST /auth/logout

Clear authentication cookies.

**Authentication:** CSRF token required
**Rate Limit:** 20 requests/minute

**Headers:**
| Header | Required | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `X-CSRF-Token` | Yes | CSRF token from cookie |

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Example:**
```bash
curl -X POST https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/logout \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <csrf-token>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>"
```

---

## Profile Endpoints

### GET /v1/me

Fetch authenticated user's profile.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "displayName": "John Doe",
  "handicap": 15.2,
  "ghin": "1234567",
  "avatarUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...",
  "createdAt": "2025-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2025-12-01T14:22:00.000Z"
}
```

---

### PUT /v1/me

Update authenticated user's profile.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "firstName": "John",        // optional, string
  "lastName": "Doe",          // optional, string
  "ghinNumber": "1234567",    // optional, string (empty string → null)
  "handicap": 15.2            // optional, number (-10 to 54) or null
}
```

**Validation:**
| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `firstName` | string | Optional |
| `lastName` | string | Optional |
| `ghinNumber` | string | Optional, empty string clears value |
| `handicap` | number/null | Optional, range: -10 to 54 |

**Response:** Updated profile object (same as GET /v1/me)

---

### GET /v1/me/stats

Fetch user's golf statistics.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:**
```json
{
  "totalRounds": 42,
  "averageScore": 87.5,
  "bestScore": 78,
  "worstScore": 102,
  "recentRounds": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "date": "2025-12-01",
      "courseName": "Pebble Beach",
      "strokes": 85
    }
  ],
  "mostPlayedCourses": [
    {
      "name": "Local Muni",
      "count": 15
    }
  ],
  "scoreTrend": [85, 88, 82, 86, 84]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/me/playing-partners

Fetch aggregated playing partner statistics.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:**
```json
{
  "partners": [
    {
      "name": "Jane Smith",
      "roundsTogether": 12,
      "lastPlayed": "2025-12-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/me/export

Export all user data (GDPR compliance).

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:** JSON file download containing all user data

---

### DELETE /v1/me

Delete user account and all associated data.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Note:** This action is irreversible. All rounds, profile data, and linked records will be permanently deleted.

---

## Rounds Endpoints

### GET /v1/rounds

List authenticated user's rounds.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `limit` | number | 20 | Results per page (max: 100) |
| `offset` | number | 0 | Pagination offset |
| `sortBy` | string | `date` | Sort field: `date`, `courseName`, `strokes`, `createdAt` |
| `sortOrder` | string | `desc` | Sort direction: `asc`, `desc` |
| `search` | string | - | Filter by course name (partial match) |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "rounds": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "date": "2025-12-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "courseName": "Pebble Beach",
      "courseId": "course-uuid",
      "strokes": 85,
      "front9": 42,
      "back9": 43,
      "playingPartners": "John, Jane",
      "teeTime": "2025-12-01T08:30:00.000Z",
      "latitude": 36.5672,
      "longitude": -121.9486,
      "notes": "Great weather!",
      "girPct": 55.5,
      "firPct": 64.3,
      "totalPutts": 32,
      "birdies": 2,
      "pars": 8,
      "bogeys": 6,
      "linkedRounds": [
        {
          "id": "link-uuid",
          "partnerName": "Jane Smith",
          "status": "confirmed"
        }
      ],
      "createdAt": "2025-12-01T18:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "total": 42,
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 0
}
```

---

### POST /v1/rounds

Create a new round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "courseId": "course-uuid",      // preferred: reference to Course
  "courseName": "Pebble Beach",   // fallback: string name
  "strokes": 85,                  // required: 18-200
  "front9": 42,                   // optional: 9-100
  "back9": 43,                    // optional: 9-100
  "playingPartners": "John, Jane", // optional: CSV names
  "date": "2025-12-01",           // optional: ISO date
  "teeTime": "2025-12-01T08:30:00.000Z", // optional: for matching
  "latitude": 36.5672,            // optional: GPS
  "longitude": -121.9486,         // optional: GPS
  "notes": "Great weather!",      // optional: max 500 chars

  // Advanced Stats (all optional)
  "girPct": 55.5,                 // 0-100
  "firPct": 64.3,                 // 0-100
  "approachPct": 45.0,            // 0-100
  "front9Putts": 15,              // 0-50
  "back9Putts": 17,               // 0-50
  "totalPutts": 32,               // 0-100
  "holeInOnes": 0,
  "eagles": 0,
  "birdies": 2,
  "pars": 8,
  "bogeys": 6,
  "doubleBogeys": 2,
  "triplePlusBogeys": 0
}
```

**Validation:**
| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `strokes` | number | Required, 18-200 |
| `front9` | number | Optional, 9-100 |
| `back9` | number | Optional, 9-100 |
| `courseName` | string | Optional, max 100 chars |
| `notes` | string | Optional, max 500 chars |
| `girPct`, `firPct`, `approachPct` | number | Optional, 0-100 |
| `latitude` | number | Optional, -90 to 90 |
| `longitude` | number | Optional, -180 to 180 |

**Response:** `201 Created` with created round object

---

### PUT /v1/rounds/:id

Update an existing round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Request Body:** Same as POST /v1/rounds (all fields optional)

**Response:** Updated round object

**Error:** `404 Not Found` if round doesn't exist or doesn't belong to user

---

### DELETE /v1/rounds/:id

Soft delete a round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Note:** Soft delete sets `deletedAt` timestamp. Data is preserved but hidden from queries.

---

### POST /v1/rounds/import-csv

Bulk import rounds from CSV data.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "rounds": [
    { "courseName": "Course 1", "strokes": 85, "date": "2025-12-01" },
    { "courseName": "Course 2", "strokes": 88, "date": "2025-11-28" }
  ]
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "imported": 2,
  "rounds": [/* created round objects */]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/rounds/:id/suggestions

Find potential playing partner matches.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Matching Algorithm:**
- **Time-based:** Within ±30 minutes of tee time
- **GPS-based:** Within ~111 meters (0.001 degrees)
- **Course-based:** Same courseId or courseName

**Response:**
```json
{
  "suggestions": [
    {
      "roundId": "uuid",
      "playerName": "Jane Smith",
      "courseName": "Pebble Beach",
      "date": "2025-12-01",
      "matchType": "time_and_location",
      "confidence": 0.95
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### POST /v1/rounds/:id/link/:targetId

Link two rounds as playing partners.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Source round ID |
| `targetId` | string (UUID) | Target round ID to link |

**Response:** Created link object

**Error:** `404 Not Found` if either round doesn't exist

---

### GET /v1/rounds/:id/linked

Get all rounds linked to this round.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Round ID |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "linkedRounds": [
    {
      "linkId": "uuid",
      "round": { /* round object */ },
      "status": "confirmed",
      "linkType": "playing_partner"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## Courses Endpoints

### GET /v1/courses/search

Search courses by name.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `search` | string | - | Search query (required) |
| `limit` | number | 10 | Results limit (1-100) |
| `includeApi` | boolean | false | Include Golf API results |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "courses": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Pebble Beach Golf Links",
      "city": "Pebble Beach",
      "state": "CA",
      "country": "USA",
      "totalPar": 72,
      "courseRating": 75.5,
      "slopeRating": 145,
      "source": "local"
    }
  ],
  "apiResults": [
    {
      "apiCourseId": 12345,
      "name": "Similar Course",
      "city": "Carmel",
      "state": "CA",
      "source": "api"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/courses/nearby

Find courses near GPS coordinates.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `lat` | number | Latitude (-90 to 90) |
| `lon` | number | Longitude (-180 to 180) |
| `limit` | number | Results limit (default: 10) |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "courses": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "Local Course",
      "distance": 2.5,
      "distanceUnit": "miles"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /v1/courses

List all courses.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | number | 1 | Page number |
| `limit` | number | 20 | Results per page |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "courses": [/* course objects */],
  "total": 150,
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20
}
```

---

### GET /v1/courses/:id

Get course details with statistics.

**Authentication:** None (public)

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string (UUID) | Course ID |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "name": "Pebble Beach Golf Links",
  "city": "Pebble Beach",
  "state": "CA",
  "country": "USA",
  "zipCode": "93953",
  "totalPar": 72,
  "front9Par": 36,
  "back9Par": 36,
  "courseRating": 75.5,
  "slopeRating": 145,
  "latitude": 36.5672,
  "longitude": -121.9486,
  "stats": {
    "totalRounds": 42,
    "averageScore": 89.2
  }
}
```

---

### POST /v1/courses

Create a new course.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "name": "New Course",         // required
  "city": "City Name",          // optional
  "state": "CA",                // optional
  "country": "USA",             // optional
  "totalPar": 72,               // optional
  "courseRating": 72.5,         // optional
  "slopeRating": 130            // optional
}
```

**Response:** `201 Created` with created course object

---

### POST /v1/courses/import

Import course from Golf API.

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF required

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "apiCourseId": 12345
}
```

**Response:** Created course object with API data

---

### PUT /v1/courses/:id

Update course (admin only).

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF + Admin role required

**Request Body:** Same as POST /v1/courses (all fields optional)

**Response:** Updated course object

---

### DELETE /v1/courses/:id

Delete course (admin only).

**Authentication:** JWT + CSRF + Admin role required

**Response:** `204 No Content`

---

## Response Formats

### Success Response

```json
{
  "data": { /* response data */ }
}
```

Or for collections:
```json
{
  "items": [/* array of items */],
  "total": 100,
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 20
}
```

### Error Response

```json
{
  "statusCode": 400,
  "message": "Validation failed",
  "error": "Bad Request",
  "details": [
    {
      "field": "strokes",
      "message": "strokes must be between 18 and 200"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## Error Codes

| Status Code | Meaning | Common Causes |
|-------------|---------|---------------|
| 200 | Success | Request completed successfully |
| 201 | Created | Resource created successfully |
| 204 | No Content | Request completed, no body returned |
| 400 | Bad Request | Invalid input, validation failed |
| 401 | Unauthorized | Missing or invalid JWT token |
| 403 | Forbidden | CSRF token mismatch, insufficient permissions |
| 404 | Not Found | Resource doesn't exist or not owned by user |
| 409 | Conflict | Duplicate resource (e.g., course name) |
| 429 | Too Many Requests | Rate limit exceeded |
| 500 | Server Error | Unhandled exception |

---

## Rate Limiting

| Endpoint Category | Limit | Window |
|-------------------|-------|--------|
| Default | 120 requests | 1 minute |
| Authentication | 20 requests | 1 minute |
| Session check | 20 requests | 1 minute |

**Rate Limit Headers:**
```
X-RateLimit-Limit: 120
X-RateLimit-Remaining: 115
X-RateLimit-Reset: 1701432000
```

**Rate Limit Exceeded Response:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 429,
  "message": "ThrottlerException: Too Many Requests",
  "error": "Too Many Requests"
}
```

---

## Testing Examples

### Check Authentication Status
```bash
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session
```

### Get User Profile (Authenticated)
```bash
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/me \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <token>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>"
```

### Create a Round
```bash
curl -X POST https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/rounds \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "X-CSRF-Token: <token>" \
  --cookie "lg_jwt=<jwt>; csrf_token=<csrf>" \
  -d '{
    "courseName": "Local Muni",
    "strokes": 85,
    "date": "2025-12-06"
  }'
```

### Search Courses
```bash
curl "https://api.lazygolfing.com/v1/courses/search?search=pebble&limit=5"
```

---
