input.content:
# Database Schema

> Prisma schema documentation for the Lazy Golfing platform

**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06
**Database:** PostgreSQL
**ORM:** Prisma 6.17.0
**Schema Location:** `lzg.backend/prisma/schema.prisma`

---

## Table of Contents

- [Entity Relationship Diagram](#entity-relationship-diagram)
- [Models Overview](#models-overview)
- [User Model](#user-model)
- [Player Model](#player-model)
- [Round Model](#round-model)
- [Course Model](#course-model)
- [RoundLink Model](#roundlink-model)
- [Role & UserRole Models](#role--userrole-models)
- [AuditLog Model](#auditlog-model)
- [Indexes](#indexes)
- [Migrations](#migrations)
- [Common Queries](#common-queries)

---

## Entity Relationship Diagram

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           LAZY GOLFING DATABASE                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  ┌──────────┐         ┌──────────┐         ┌──────────┐                     │
│  │   User   │ 1────1  │  Player  │ 1────N  │  Round   │                     │
│  │          │         │          │         │          │                     │
│  │ id       │         │ id       │         │ id       │                     │
│  │ email    │         │ firstName│         │ date     │                     │
│  │ provider │         │ lastName │         │ strokes  │                     │
│  │ avatarUrl│         │ handicap │         │ courseId │────┐                │
│  └────┬─────┘         │ ghinNum  │         │ playerId │    │                │
│       │               └──────────┘         │ teeTime  │    │                │
│       │ N                                  │ GPS      │    │                │
│       │                                    │ stats... │    │                │
│  ┌────┴─────┐                              └────┬─────┘    │                │
│  │ UserRole │                                   │          │                │
│  │          │                                   │          │                │
│  │ userId   │                              ┌────┴─────┐    │                │
│  │ roleId   │                              │RoundLink │    │  ┌──────────┐  │
│  └────┬─────┘                              │          │    │  │  Course  │  │
│       │ N                                  │ sourceId │    │  │          │  │
│  ┌────┴─────┐                              │ targetId │    └──│ id       │  │
│  │   Role   │                              │ status   │       │ name     │  │
│  │          │                              │ linkType │       │ city     │  │
│  │ id       │                              └──────────┘       │ par      │  │
│  │ name     │                                                 │ rating   │  │
│  │ (admin)  │                                                 │ slope    │  │
│  │ (user)   │                                                 │ GPS      │  │
│  └──────────┘                                                 └──────────┘  │
│                                                                              │
│  ┌──────────┐                                                               │
│  │ AuditLog │  (Independent logging - no FK relationships)                  │
│  │          │                                                               │
│  │ userId   │                                                               │
│  │ action   │                                                               │
│  │ resource │                                                               │
│  │ metadata │                                                               │
│  └──────────┘                                                               │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Relationship Summary

| Relationship | Type | Description |
|--------------|------|-------------|
| User → Player | 1:1 | Each user has one golf profile |
| Player → Round | 1:N | Each player has many rounds |
| Course → Round | 1:N | Each course has many rounds (optional FK) |
| Round ↔ Round | N:N | Rounds can be linked (via RoundLink) |
| User ↔ Role | N:N | Users can have multiple roles (via UserRole) |

---

## Models Overview

| Model | Purpose | Key Fields |
|-------|---------|------------|
| **User** | OAuth identity | email, provider, providerId |
| **Player** | Golf profile | handicap, ghinNumber, userId |
| **Round** | Golf rounds | strokes, date, courseId, playerId |
| **Course** | Golf courses | name, par, rating, slope, GPS |
| **RoundLink** | Playing partner links | sourceRoundId, targetRoundId, status |
| **Role** | RBAC roles | name (admin, user) |
| **UserRole** | User-role junction | userId, roleId |
| **AuditLog** | Action logging | userId, action, resource, metadata |

---

## User Model

Stores OAuth identity information from Google.

```prisma
model User {
  id            String     @id @default(uuid())
  email         String     @unique
  firstName     String
  lastName      String
  provider      String                    // 'google'
  providerId    String                    // Google user ID
  avatarUrl     String?                   // Google profile picture
  locale        String?                   // User locale (e.g., 'en')
  emailVerified Boolean    @default(false)
  hostedDomain  String?                   // Google Workspace domain
  lastLoginAt   DateTime?
  createdAt     DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime   @updatedAt

  player        Player?                   // 1:1 golf profile
  userRoles     UserRole[]                // N:N roles

  @@unique([provider, providerId])        // Unique per OAuth provider
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | UUID | No | auto-generated | Primary key |
| `email` | String | No | - | Unique email address |
| `firstName` | String | No | - | From OAuth profile |
| `lastName` | String | No | - | From OAuth profile |
| `provider` | String | No | - | Always 'google' currently |
| `providerId` | String | No | - | Google user ID |
| `avatarUrl` | String | Yes | - | Profile picture URL |
| `locale` | String | Yes | - | User's locale preference |
| `emailVerified` | Boolean | No | false | Email verification status |
| `hostedDomain` | String | Yes | - | Google Workspace domain |
| `lastLoginAt` | DateTime | Yes | - | Last login timestamp |

---

## Player Model

Stores golf-specific profile information.

```prisma
model Player {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  firstName   String
  lastName    String
  ghinNumber  String?                     // GHIN identifier
  handicap    Float?                      // Golf handicap index
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  userId      String   @unique            // FK to User
  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  rounds      Round[]                     // 1:N rounds

  @@index([userId])
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Constraints | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|-------------|
| `id` | UUID | No | PK | Primary key |
| `firstName` | String | No | - | Player first name |
| `lastName` | String | No | - | Player last name |
| `ghinNumber` | String | Yes | - | GHIN handicap ID |
| `handicap` | Float | Yes | -10 to 54 | Handicap index |
| `userId` | String | No | Unique, FK | Reference to User |

**Cascade Behavior:** Deleting a User deletes their Player profile.

---

## Round Model

Stores golf round data with optional advanced statistics.

```prisma
model Round {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  date            DateTime  @default(now())
  courseName      String?                    // Legacy: string course name
  courseId        String?                    // New: FK to Course
  strokes         Int                        // Total strokes (required)
  front9          Int?                       // Front 9 score
  back9           Int?                       // Back 9 score
  playingPartners String?                    // Manual text entry
  teeTime         DateTime?                  // For auto-linking
  latitude        Float?                     // GPS coordinate
  longitude       Float?                     // GPS coordinate
  notes           String?                    // Round notes
  deletedAt       DateTime?                  // Soft delete timestamp
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())

  // Advanced Golf Statistics
  girPct          Float?                     // Greens in Regulation %
  firPct          Float?                     // Fairways in Regulation %
  approachPct     Float?                     // Approach accuracy %
  front9Putts     Int?                       // Front 9 putts
  back9Putts      Int?                       // Back 9 putts
  totalPutts      Int?                       // Total putts
  holeInOnes      Int?
  eagles          Int?
  birdies         Int?
  pars            Int?
  bogeys          Int?
  doubleBogeys    Int?
  triplePlusBogeys Int?

  playerId        String                     // FK to Player
  player          Player   @relation(fields: [playerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  course          Course?  @relation(fields: [courseId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  linkedFrom      RoundLink[] @relation("SourceRound")
  linkedTo        RoundLink[] @relation("TargetRound")

  @@index([playerId, date])
  @@index([playerId, deletedAt])
  @@index([courseId])
  @@index([courseId, date, teeTime])
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Constraints | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|-------------|
| `strokes` | Int | No | 18-200 | Total round strokes |
| `front9` | Int | Yes | 9-100 | Front 9 score |
| `back9` | Int | Yes | 9-100 | Back 9 score |
| `courseName` | String | Yes | max 100 | Legacy text course name |
| `courseId` | String | Yes | FK | Reference to Course model |
| `playingPartners` | String | Yes | - | CSV list of partner names |
| `teeTime` | DateTime | Yes | - | Tee time for matching |
| `latitude` | Float | Yes | -90 to 90 | GPS latitude |
| `longitude` | Float | Yes | -180 to 180 | GPS longitude |
| `notes` | String | Yes | max 500 | Round notes |
| `deletedAt` | DateTime | Yes | - | Soft delete timestamp |
| `girPct` | Float | Yes | 0-100 | Greens in Regulation % |
| `firPct` | Float | Yes | 0-100 | Fairways in Regulation % |
| `totalPutts` | Int | Yes | 0-100 | Total putts |

**Soft Delete:** Rounds are never hard-deleted. `deletedAt` is set instead.

**Cascade Behavior:**
- Deleting a Player deletes their Rounds
- Deleting a Course sets `courseId` to null (preserves rounds)

---

## Course Model

Stores golf course information with optional Golf API integration.

```prisma
model Course {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  name          String
  city          String?
  state         String?
  country       String?
  zipCode       String?
  totalPar      Int?
  front9Par     Int?
  back9Par      Int?
  courseRating  Float?
  slopeRating   Int?
  apiCourseId   Int?      @unique           // Golf API integration
  apiData       Json?                       // Complete API response cache
  latitude      Float?
  longitude     Float?
  lastSynced    DateTime  @default(now())
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  rounds        Round[]                     // 1:N rounds

  @@index([name])
  @@index([city, state])
  @@index([latitude, longitude])
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `name` | String | No | Course name (required) |
| `city` | String | Yes | City location |
| `state` | String | Yes | State/province |
| `country` | String | Yes | Country |
| `zipCode` | String | Yes | Postal code |
| `totalPar` | Int | Yes | Course par |
| `front9Par` | Int | Yes | Front 9 par |
| `back9Par` | Int | Yes | Back 9 par |
| `courseRating` | Float | Yes | USGA course rating |
| `slopeRating` | Int | Yes | USGA slope rating |
| `apiCourseId` | Int | Yes | External Golf API ID |
| `apiData` | Json | Yes | Cached API response |
| `latitude` | Float | Yes | GPS latitude |
| `longitude` | Float | Yes | GPS longitude |
| `lastSynced` | DateTime | No | Last API sync time |

---

## RoundLink Model

Junction table for linking rounds (playing partners).

```prisma
model RoundLink {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  sourceRoundId String
  targetRoundId String
  linkType      String    @default("playing_partner")
  status        String    @default("pending")  // pending, confirmed, rejected
  createdBy     String                         // User ID who created link
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  sourceRound   Round     @relation("SourceRound", fields: [sourceRoundId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  targetRound   Round     @relation("TargetRound", fields: [targetRoundId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([sourceRoundId, targetRoundId])
  @@index([sourceRoundId])
  @@index([targetRoundId])
  @@index([status])
}
```

### Status Values

| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `pending` | Link created, awaiting confirmation |
| `confirmed` | Both parties confirmed |
| `rejected` | Link was rejected |

### Link Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `playing_partner` | Played in same group |

---

## Role & UserRole Models

RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) implementation.

```prisma
model Role {
  id          String     @id @default(uuid())
  name        String     @unique              // 'admin', 'user'
  description String?
  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())

  userRoles   UserRole[]
}

model UserRole {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String
  roleId    String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  role      Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, roleId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([roleId])
}
```

### Default Roles

| Role | Description | Auto-Assigned |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| `admin` | Full system access | `info@lazygolfing.com` |
| `user` | Standard user access | All other users |

---

## AuditLog Model

Stores action logs for compliance and debugging.

```prisma
model AuditLog {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String                          // Who performed action
  action    String                          // Action type
  resource  String?                         // Resource identifier
  metadata  Json?                           // Additional context
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId, createdAt])
  @@index([action, createdAt])
}
```

### Action Types

| Category | Actions |
|----------|---------|
| **Auth** | LOGIN, LOGOUT, AUTH_FAILED |
| **Profile** | PROFILE_UPDATED, PROFILE_VIEWED |
| **Rounds** | ROUND_CREATED, ROUND_UPDATED, ROUND_VIEWED, ROUND_DELETED |
| **Courses** | COURSE_CREATED, COURSE_UPDATED, COURSE_DELETED |
| **Account** | ACCOUNT_DELETED, DATA_EXPORTED |

### Running Migrations

```bash

## Common Queries

### Get User with Profile
```typescript
const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
  where: { id: userId },
  include: {
    player: true,
    userRoles: { include: { role: true } }
  }
});
```

### Get User's Rounds (excluding soft-deleted)
```typescript
const rounds = await prisma.round.findMany({
  where: {
    playerId: playerId,
    deletedAt: null
  },
  include: {
    course: true,
    linkedFrom: { include: { targetRound: true } },
    linkedTo: { include: { sourceRound: true } }
  },
  orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
  take: 20
});
```

### Search Courses by Name
```typescript
const courses = await prisma.course.findMany({
  where: {
    name: {
      contains: searchQuery,
      mode: 'insensitive'
    }
  },
  take: 10
});
```

### Find Nearby Courses (with Haversine)
```typescript
// In CoursesService - uses raw SQL with Haversine formula
const courses = await prisma.$queryRaw`
  SELECT *,
    (6371 * acos(cos(radians(${lat})) * cos(radians(latitude)) *
    cos(radians(longitude) - radians(${lon})) +
    sin(radians(${lat})) * sin(radians(latitude)))) AS distance
  FROM "Course"
  WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY distance
  LIMIT ${limit}
`;
```

### Get User Statistics
```typescript
const stats = await prisma.round.aggregate({
  where: {
    playerId: playerId,
    deletedAt: null
  },
  _count: { id: true },
  _avg: { strokes: true },
  _min: { strokes: true },
  _max: { strokes: true }
});
```

### Find Potential Playing Partner Matches
```typescript
const matches = await prisma.round.findMany({
  where: {
    id: { not: sourceRoundId },
    playerId: { not: playerId },
    deletedAt: null,
    OR: [
      // Same course
      { courseId: sourceRound.courseId },
      // Same tee time (±30 min)
      {
        teeTime: {
          gte: new Date(sourceRound.teeTime.getTime() - 30 * 60 * 1000),
          lte: new Date(sourceRound.teeTime.getTime() + 30 * 60 * 1000)
        }
      },
      // Same location (±111m)
      {
        AND: [
          { latitude: { gte: sourceRound.latitude - 0.001, lte: sourceRound.latitude + 0.001 } },
          { longitude: { gte: sourceRound.longitude - 0.001, lte: sourceRound.longitude + 0.001 } }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
});
```

### Create Audit Log Entry
```typescript
await prisma.auditLog.create({
  data: {
    userId,
    action: 'ROUND_CREATED',
    resource: `Round:${round.id}`,
    metadata: { strokes: round.strokes, courseName: round.courseName }
  }
});
```

## Entity Relationship Diagram

│  │ id       │         │ id       │         │ id       │                     │

│  │          │                                   │          │                │

│       │ N                                  │ sourceId │    │  │          │  │

### Relationship Summary

| Relationship | Type | Description |
|--------------|------|-------------|
| User → Player | 1:1 | Each user has one golf profile |
| Player → Round | 1:N | Each player has many rounds |
| Course → Round | 1:N | Each course has many rounds (optional FK) |
| Round ↔ Round | N:N | Rounds can be linked (via RoundLink) |
| User ↔ Role | N:N | Users can have multiple roles (via UserRole) |

## Models Overview

| Model | Purpose | Key Fields |
|-------|---------|------------|
| **User** | OAuth identity | email, provider, providerId |
| **Player** | Golf profile | handicap, ghinNumber, userId |
| **Round** | Golf rounds | strokes, date, courseId, playerId |
| **Course** | Golf courses | name, par, rating, slope, GPS |
| **RoundLink** | Playing partner links | sourceRoundId, targetRoundId, status |
| **Role** | RBAC roles | name (admin, user) |
| **UserRole** | User-role junction | userId, roleId |
| **AuditLog** | Action logging | userId, action, resource, metadata |

## User Model

Stores OAuth identity information from Google.

```prisma
model User {
  id            String     @id @default(uuid())
  email         String     @unique
  firstName     String
  lastName      String
  provider      String                    // 'google'
  providerId    String                    // Google user ID
  avatarUrl     String?                   // Google profile picture
  locale        String?                   // User locale (e.g., 'en')
  emailVerified Boolean    @default(false)
  hostedDomain  String?                   // Google Workspace domain
  lastLoginAt   DateTime?
  createdAt     DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime   @updatedAt

  player        Player?                   // 1:1 golf profile
  userRoles     UserRole[]                // N:N roles

  @@unique([provider, providerId])        // Unique per OAuth provider
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | UUID | No | auto-generated | Primary key |
| `email` | String | No | - | Unique email address |
| `firstName` | String | No | - | From OAuth profile |
| `lastName` | String | No | - | From OAuth profile |
| `provider` | String | No | - | Always 'google' currently |
| `providerId` | String | No | - | Google user ID |
| `avatarUrl` | String | Yes | - | Profile picture URL |
| `locale` | String | Yes | - | User's locale preference |
| `emailVerified` | Boolean | No | false | Email verification status |
| `hostedDomain` | String | Yes | - | Google Workspace domain |
| `lastLoginAt` | DateTime | Yes | - | Last login timestamp |

---

## Player Model

Stores golf-specific profile information.

```prisma
model Player {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  firstName   String
  lastName    String
  ghinNumber  String?                     // GHIN identifier
  handicap    Float?                      // Golf handicap index
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  userId      String   @unique            // FK to User
  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  rounds      Round[]                     // 1:N rounds

  @@index([userId])
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Constraints | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|-------------|
| `id` | UUID | No | PK | Primary key |
| `firstName` | String | No | - | Player first name |
| `lastName` | String | No | - | Player last name |
| `ghinNumber` | String | Yes | - | GHIN handicap ID |
| `handicap` | Float | Yes | -10 to 54 | Handicap index |
| `userId` | String | No | Unique, FK | Reference to User |

**Cascade Behavior:** Deleting a User deletes their Player profile.

## Round Model

Stores golf round data with optional advanced statistics.

```prisma
model Round {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  date            DateTime  @default(now())
  courseName      String?                    // Legacy: string course name
  courseId        String?                    // New: FK to Course
  strokes         Int                        // Total strokes (required)
  front9          Int?                       // Front 9 score
  back9           Int?                       // Back 9 score
  playingPartners String?                    // Manual text entry
  teeTime         DateTime?                  // For auto-linking
  latitude        Float?                     // GPS coordinate
  longitude       Float?                     // GPS coordinate
  notes           String?                    // Round notes
  deletedAt       DateTime?                  // Soft delete timestamp
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())

  // Advanced Golf Statistics
  girPct          Float?                     // Greens in Regulation %
  firPct          Float?                     // Fairways in Regulation %
  approachPct     Float?                     // Approach accuracy %
  front9Putts     Int?                       // Front 9 putts
  back9Putts      Int?                       // Back 9 putts
  totalPutts      Int?                       // Total putts
  holeInOnes      Int?
  eagles          Int?
  birdies         Int?
  pars            Int?
  bogeys          Int?
  doubleBogeys    Int?
  triplePlusBogeys Int?

  playerId        String                     // FK to Player
  player          Player   @relation(fields: [playerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  course          Course?  @relation(fields: [courseId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  linkedFrom      RoundLink[] @relation("SourceRound")
  linkedTo        RoundLink[] @relation("TargetRound")

  @@index([playerId, date])
  @@index([playerId, deletedAt])
  @@index([courseId])
  @@index([courseId, date, teeTime])
}
```

### Field Details

| Field | Type | Nullable | Constraints | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|-------------|
| `strokes` | Int | No | 18-200 | Total round strokes |
| `front9` | Int | Yes | 9-100 | Front 9 score |
| `back9` | Int | Yes | 9-100 | Back 9 score |
| `courseName` | String | Yes | max 100 | Legacy text course name |
| `courseId` | String | Yes | FK | Reference to Course model |
| `playingPartners` | String | Yes | - | CSV list of partner names |
| `teeTime` | DateTime | Yes | - | Tee time for matching |
| `latitude` | Float | Yes | -90 to 90 | GPS latitude |
| `longitude` | Float | Yes | -180 to 180 | GPS longitude |
| `notes` | String | Yes | max 500 | Round notes |
| `deletedAt` | DateTime | Yes | - | Soft delete timestamp |
| `girPct` | Float | Yes | 0-100 | Greens in Regulation % |
| `firPct` | Float | Yes | 0-100 | Fairways in Regulation % |
| `totalPutts` | Int | Yes | 0-100 | Total putts |

**Soft Delete:** Rounds are never hard-deleted. `deletedAt` is set instead.

**Cascade Behavior:**
- Deleting a Player deletes their Rounds
- Deleting a Course sets `courseId` to null (preserves rounds)

model Course {

  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  rounds        Round[]                     // 1:N rounds

  @@index([name])
  @@index([city, state])
  @@index([latitude, longitude])
}

## RoundLink Model

Junction table for linking rounds (playing partners).

```prisma
model RoundLink {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  sourceRoundId String
  targetRoundId String
  linkType      String    @default("playing_partner")
  status        String    @default("pending")  // pending, confirmed, rejected
  createdBy     String                         // User ID who created link
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  sourceRound   Round     @relation("SourceRound", fields: [sourceRoundId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  targetRound   Round     @relation("TargetRound", fields: [targetRoundId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([sourceRoundId, targetRoundId])
  @@index([sourceRoundId])
  @@index([targetRoundId])
  @@index([status])
}
```

### Status Values

| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `pending` | Link created, awaiting confirmation |
| `confirmed` | Both parties confirmed |
| `rejected` | Link was rejected |

### Link Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `playing_partner` | Played in same group |

---

## Role & UserRole Models

RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) implementation.

```prisma
model Role {
  id          String     @id @default(uuid())
  name        String     @unique              // 'admin', 'user'
  description String?
  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())

  userRoles   UserRole[]
}

model UserRole {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String
  roleId    String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  role      Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, roleId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([roleId])
}
```

### Default Roles

| Role | Description | Auto-Assigned |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| `admin` | Full system access | `info@lazygolfing.com` |
| `user` | Standard user access | All other users |

---

## AuditLog Model

Stores action logs for compliance and debugging.

```prisma
model AuditLog {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String                          // Who performed action
  action    String                          // Action type
  resource  String?                         // Resource identifier
  metadata  Json?                           // Additional context
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId, createdAt])
  @@index([action, createdAt])
}
```

### Action Types

| Category | Actions |
|----------|---------|
| **Auth** | LOGIN, LOGOUT, AUTH_FAILED |
| **Profile** | PROFILE_UPDATED, PROFILE_VIEWED |
| **Rounds** | ROUND_CREATED, ROUND_UPDATED, ROUND_VIEWED, ROUND_DELETED |
| **Courses** | COURSE_CREATED, COURSE_UPDATED, COURSE_DELETED |
| **Account** | ACCOUNT_DELETED, DATA_EXPORTED |

---

## Indexes

### Performance Indexes

| Table | Index | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
| Round | `(playerId, date)` | User round lookups by date |
| Round | `(playerId, deletedAt)` | Soft delete queries |
| Round | `(courseId)` | Course-based lookups |
| Round | `(courseId, date, teeTime)` | Playing partner matching |
| Course | `(name)` | Course name search |
| Course | `(city, state)` | Location-based search |
| Course | `(latitude, longitude)` | GPS-based queries |
| AuditLog | `(userId, createdAt)` | User action history |
| AuditLog | `(action, createdAt)` | Action-type queries |
| RoundLink | `(sourceRoundId)` | Link source lookups |
| RoundLink | `(targetRoundId)` | Link target lookups |
| RoundLink | `(status)` | Status filtering |

### Unique Constraints

| Table | Constraint | Fields |
|-------|------------|--------|
| User | Primary | `id` |
| User | Unique | `email` |
| User | Unique | `(provider, providerId)` |
| Player | Unique | `userId` |
| Course | Unique | `apiCourseId` |
| RoundLink | Unique | `(sourceRoundId, targetRoundId)` |
| UserRole | Unique | `(userId, roleId)` |
| Role | Unique | `name` |

---

## Migrations

### Migration History

| Migration | Date | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `init` | 2025-10-07 | Initial schema (User, Player, Round) |
| `round_add_notes` | 2025-10-08 | Added notes field to Round |
| `add_oauth_profile_fields` | 2025-10-09 | Extended User OAuth fields |
| `add_audit_log_and_soft_deletes` | 2025-10-28 | AuditLog model, soft deletes |
| `enable_pgcrypto_extension` | 2025-10-28 | PostgreSQL UUID extension |
| `add_course_model` | 2025-10-28 | Course model |
| `add_rbac_and_cascade_deletes` | 2025-11-05 | Role, UserRole, cascades |
| `add_round_details` | 2025-11-05 | Advanced round statistics |
| `add_round_linking_and_gps` | 2025-11-05 | RoundLink, GPS fields |

### Running Migrations

```bash
# Create new migration
npx prisma migrate dev --name <migration_name>

# Apply migrations (development)
npx prisma migrate dev

# Apply migrations (production)
npx prisma migrate deploy

# Reset database (development only)
npx prisma migrate reset

# Generate Prisma Client after schema changes
npx prisma generate
```

---

## Common Queries

### Get User with Profile
```typescript
const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
  where: { id: userId },
  include: {
    player: true,
    userRoles: { include: { role: true } }
  }
});
```

### Get User's Rounds (excluding soft-deleted)
```typescript
const rounds = await prisma.round.findMany({
  where: {
    playerId: playerId,
    deletedAt: null
  },
  include: {
    course: true,
    linkedFrom: { include: { targetRound: true } },
    linkedTo: { include: { sourceRound: true } }
  },
  orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
  take: 20
});
```

### Search Courses by Name
```typescript
const courses = await prisma.course.findMany({
  where: {
    name: {
      contains: searchQuery,
      mode: 'insensitive'
    }
  },
  take: 10
});
```

### Find Nearby Courses (with Haversine)
```typescript
// In CoursesService - uses raw SQL with Haversine formula
const courses = await prisma.$queryRaw`
  SELECT *,
    (6371 * acos(cos(radians(${lat})) * cos(radians(latitude)) *
    cos(radians(longitude) - radians(${lon})) +
    sin(radians(${lat})) * sin(radians(latitude)))) AS distance
  FROM "Course"
  WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY distance
  LIMIT ${limit}
`;
```

### Get User Statistics
```typescript
const stats = await prisma.round.aggregate({
  where: {
    playerId: playerId,
    deletedAt: null
  },
  _count: { id: true },
  _avg: { strokes: true },
  _min: { strokes: true },
  _max: { strokes: true }
});
```

### Find Potential Playing Partner Matches
```typescript
const matches = await prisma.round.findMany({
  where: {
    id: { not: sourceRoundId },
    playerId: { not: playerId },
    deletedAt: null,
    OR: [
      // Same course
      { courseId: sourceRound.courseId },
      // Same tee time (±30 min)
      {
        teeTime: {
          gte: new Date(sourceRound.teeTime.getTime() - 30 * 60 * 1000),
          lte: new Date(sourceRound.teeTime.getTime() + 30 * 60 * 1000)
        }
      },
      // Same location (±111m)
      {
        AND: [
          { latitude: { gte: sourceRound.latitude - 0.001, lte: sourceRound.latitude + 0.001 } },
          { longitude: { gte: sourceRound.longitude - 0.001, lte: sourceRound.longitude + 0.001 } }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
});
```

### Create Audit Log Entry
```typescript
await prisma.auditLog.create({
  data: {
    userId,
    action: 'ROUND_CREATED',
    resource: `Round:${round.id}`,
    metadata: { strokes: round.strokes, courseName: round.courseName }
  }
});
```

---

## Database Maintenance

### Prisma Studio (GUI)
```bash
# Start Prisma Studio on port 5555
npx prisma studio
```

### Seeding
```bash
# Run seed script
npm run prisma:seed
```

### Backup Considerations
- Use PostgreSQL `pg_dump` for backups
- Consider daily automated backups
- Test restore procedures quarterly

---

*This schema documentation is derived from `lzg.backend/prisma/schema.prisma`.*

content.content:
1→# CLAUDE.md - Backend (lzg.backend)
     2→
     3→> AI assistant guidelines for the NestJS API backend
     4→
     5→**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06
     6→
     7→---
     8→
     9→## Quick Reference
    10→
    11→### Environment
    12→
    13→- **Code editing:** Windows machine (this repo)
    14→- **Runtime:** Ubuntu VM at `192.168.1.40`
    15→- **Production:** https://api.lazygolfing.com
    16→
    17→### Essential Commands (Run on VM)
    18→
    19→```bash
    20→# Development
    21→npm run start:dev               # Hot-reload server
    22→npm run start:debug             # Debug mode (port 9229)
    23→npm run test                    # Unit tests
    24→npm run lint                    # ESLint
    25→
    26→# Database
    27→npx prisma generate             # REQUIRED after schema changes
    28→npx prisma migrate dev --name <name>  # Create migration
    29→npx prisma studio               # GUI at 192.168.1.40:5555
    30→
    31→# Production
    32→pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100     # View logs
    33→pm2 restart lg-api              # After deploy
    34→```
    35→
    36→---
    37→
    38→## Module Structure
    39→
    40→```
    41→src/
    42→├── main.ts                     # Bootstrap (CORS, validation, cookies)
    43→├── app.module.ts               # Root module
    44→├── auth/                       # Google OAuth + JWT
    45→│   ├── auth.controller.ts      # /auth/google, /auth/session, /auth/logout
    46→│   ├── auth.service.ts         # findOrCreateUser, validateUser
    47→│   ├── google.strategy.ts      # Passport Google OAuth
    48→│   ├── jwt.strategy.ts         # Passport JWT validation
    49→│   ├── jwt-auth.guard.ts       # Guard for protected routes
    50→│   └── current-user.decorator.ts  # @CurrentUser() decorator
    51→├── profile/                    # User profile
    52→│   ├── profile.controller.ts   # GET/PUT /v1/me
    53→│   ├── profile.service.ts      # getProfile, updateProfile
    54→│   └── update-profile.dto.ts   # Validation DTO
    55→├── rounds/                     # Golf rounds
    56→│   ├── rounds.controller.ts    # CRUD /v1/rounds
    57→│   ├── rounds.service.ts       # Business logic
    58→│   └── dto/                    # create-round.dto.ts, update-round.dto.ts
    59→├── courses/                    # Course management
    60→├── prisma/                     # Database (Global module)
    61→│   └── prisma.service.ts       # Extends PrismaClient
    62→└── audit-log/                  # Action logging
    63→```
    64→
    65→---
    66→
    67→## API Endpoints
    68→
    69→### Authentication (Public)
    70→
    71→| Method | Path | Description |
    72→|--------|------|-------------|
    73→| GET | `/auth/google` | Start OAuth flow |
    74→| GET | `/auth/google/redirect` | OAuth callback |
    75→| GET | `/auth/session` | Check login status |
    76→| GET | `/auth/logout` | Clear session |
    77→
    78→### Profile (Requires JWT)
    79→
    80→| Method | Path | Description |
    81→|--------|------|-------------|
    82→| GET | `/v1/me` | Get user + player profile |
    83→| PUT | `/v1/me` | Update player profile |
    84→
    85→### Rounds (Requires JWT)
    86→
    87→| Method | Path | Description |
    88→|--------|------|-------------|
    89→| GET | `/v1/rounds` | List player's rounds |
    90→| POST | `/v1/rounds` | Create round |
    91→| PUT | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Update round |
    92→| DELETE | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Soft delete round |
    93→
    94→### Courses
    95→
    96→| Method | Path | Description |
    97→|--------|------|-------------|
    98→| GET | `/v1/courses` | List/search courses |
    99→| GET | `/v1/courses/:id` | Get course details |
   100→| GET | `/v1/courses/search` | Search by name |
   101→
   102→---
   103→
   104→## Database Schema
   105→
   106→### Model Relationships
   107→
   108→```
   109→User (OAuth identity)
   110→  └── 1:1 Player (golf profile)
   111→           └── 1:N Round
   112→                     └── N:1 Course (optional)
   113→
   114→Role ←─ N:N ─→ User (via UserRole)
   115→AuditLog (standalone)
   116→```
   117→
   118→### Key Fields
   119→
   120→| Model | Key Fields |
   121→|-------|------------|
   122→| User | email, provider, providerId, avatarUrl, lastLoginAt |
   123→| Player | firstName, lastName, ghinNumber, handicap |
   124→| Round | strokes, front9, back9, girPct, firPct, totalPutts, birdies, pars, bogeys |
   125→| Course | name, city, state, totalPar, courseRating, slopeRating, apiCourseId |
   126→
   127→---
   128→
   129→## Authentication Flow
   130→
   131→```
   132→1. Frontend → GET /auth/google
   133→2. Redirect to Google consent
   134→3. Google → /auth/google/redirect with code
   135→4. GoogleStrategy exchanges code for user info
   136→5. auth.service.findOrCreateUser() → User + Player
   137→6. Sign JWT, set lg_jwt cookie (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=None, 7 days)
   138→7. Redirect to frontend success page
   139→```
   140→
   141→### Cookie Config
   142→
   143→```typescript
   144→{
   145→  httpOnly: true,        // XSS protection
   146→  secure: true,          // HTTPS only (production)
   147→  sameSite: 'none',      // Cross-origin allowed
   148→  maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,  // 7 days
   149→}
   150→```
   151→
   152→### Protecting Routes
   153→
   154→```typescript
   155→@Get('protected-route')
   156→@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
   157→async myRoute(@CurrentUser() user: any) {
   158→  // user contains JWT payload
   159→}
   160→```
   161→
   162→---
   163→
   164→## Adding a New Endpoint
   165→
   166→```typescript
   167→// 1. Add DTO (src/[module]/dto/[action].dto.ts)
   168→export class CreateThingDto {
   169→  @IsString()
   170→  @IsNotEmpty()
   171→  name: string;
   172→}
   173→
   174→// 2. Add service method
   175→async createThing(playerId: string, dto: CreateThingDto) {
   176→  return this.prisma.thing.create({
   177→    data: { ...dto, playerId },
   178→  });
   179→}
   180→
   181→// 3. Add controller route
   182→@Post()
   183→@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
   184→async create(
   185→  @Body() dto: CreateThingDto,
   186→  @CurrentUser() user: any,
   187→) {
   188→  const profile = await this.profileService.getProfile(user.id);
   189→  return this.thingService.createThing(profile.player.id, dto);
   190→}
   191→
   192→// 4. Write tests and run
   193→npm run test
   194→```
   195→
   196→---
   197→
   198→## Updating Prisma Schema
   199→
   200→```bash
   201→# 1. Edit prisma/schema.prisma
   202→# 2. Format
   203→npx prisma format
   204→
   205→# 3. Create migration
   206→npx prisma migrate dev --name add_thing_field
   207→
   208→# 4. Regenerate client
   209→npx prisma generate
   210→
   211→# 5. Update DTOs and services
   212→
   213→# 6. Test
   214→npm run test
   215→```
   216→
   217→---
   218→
   219→## Environment Variables
   220→
   221→```ini
   222→PORT=3000
   223→NODE_ENV=development
   224→DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
   225→DIRECT_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
   226→JWT_SECRET=<openssl rand -base64 32>
   227→GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=<from-google-console>.apps.googleusercontent.com
   228→GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=GOCSPX-<from-google-console>
   229→GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/redirect
   230→```
   231→
   232→---
   233→
   234→## CORS Configuration
   235→
   236→Location: `src/main.ts`
   237→
   238→```typescript
   239→origin: [
   240→  'https://lazygolfing.com',
   241→  'https://www.lazygolfing.com',
   242→  'https://lazygolfing-com.pages.dev',
   243→  // Add for local dev: 'http://localhost:8080',
   244→]
   245→```
   246→
   247→---
   248→
   249→## Validation Rules (DTOs)
   250→
   251→### Profile (update-profile.dto.ts)
   252→- `firstName`: 1-50 chars
   253→- `lastName`: 1-50 chars
   254→- `ghinNumber`: 7 digits (string)
   255→- `handicap`: 0-54 (float)
   256→
   257→### Round (create-round.dto.ts)
   258→- `courseName`: 1-100 chars (required)
   259→- `strokes`: positive integer (required)
   260→- `date`: ISO 8601 datetime (optional)
   261→- `notes`: max 500 chars (optional)
   262→
   263→---
   264→
   265→## Debugging
   266→
   267→```bash
   268→# Check logs
   269→pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100
   270→
   271→# Test endpoints
   272→curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/
   273→curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/auth/session
   274→curl -H "Cookie: lg_jwt=..." http://192.168.1.40:3000/v1/me
   275→
   276→# Production
   277→curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session
   278→```
   279→
   280→### Common Issues
   281→
   282→| Symptom | Cause | Solution |
   283→|---------|-------|----------|
   284→| `Prisma Client not found` | Schema changed | `npx prisma generate` |
   285→| Migration failed | DB not running | Check PostgreSQL status |
   286→| 401 Unauthorized | Invalid JWT | Check cookie, re-login |
   287→| CORS error | Origin not allowed | Add to main.ts allowlist |
   288→| 500 Internal Server Error | Uncaught exception | Check PM2 logs |
   289→
   290→---
   291→
   292→## Deployment
   293→
   294→```bash
   295→# 1. SSH to VM
   296→# 2. Pull latest code
   297→git pull origin main
   298→
   299→# 3. Install dependencies
   300→npm ci
   301→
   302→# 4. Run migrations
   303→npx prisma migrate deploy
   304→
   305→# 5. Rebuild
   306→npm run build
   307→
   308→# 6. Restart PM2
   309→pm2 restart lg-api
   310→
   311→# 7. Verify
   312→curl http://localhost:3000/
   313→pm2 logs lg-api --lines 20
   314→```
   315→
   316→### PM2 Config (ecosystem.config.js)
   317→
   318→```javascript
   319→{
   320→  name: 'lg-api',
   321→  script: 'dist/src/main.js',
   322→  instances: 1,
   323→  exec_mode: 'fork',
   324→  autorestart: true,
   325→  max_restarts: 25,
   326→  max_memory_restart: '300M',
   327→}
   328→```
   329→
   330→---
   331→
   332→## Security Checklist
   333→
   334→Before deploying new endpoints:
   335→- [ ] Uses `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)` if protected
   336→- [ ] Input validated with class-validator DTOs
   337→- [ ] User can only access their own data
   338→- [ ] Sensitive data filtered from responses
   339→- [ ] No secrets in code or logs
   340→
   341→---
   342→
   343→*For root-level documentation, see [/CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)*
   344→*For frontend documentation, see [/lzg.home/CLAUDE.md](../lzg.home/CLAUDE.md)*
   345→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

file.content:
# CLAUDE.md - Backend (lzg.backend)

> AI assistant guidelines for the NestJS API backend

**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06

---

## Quick Reference

### Environment

- **Code editing:** Windows machine (this repo)
- **Runtime:** Ubuntu VM at `192.168.1.40`
- **Production:** https://api.lazygolfing.com

### Essential Commands (Run on VM)

```bash
# Development
npm run start:dev               # Hot-reload server
npm run start:debug             # Debug mode (port 9229)
npm run test                    # Unit tests
npm run lint                    # ESLint

# Database
npx prisma generate             # REQUIRED after schema changes
npx prisma migrate dev --name <name>  # Create migration
npx prisma studio               # GUI at 192.168.1.40:5555

# Production
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100     # View logs
pm2 restart lg-api              # After deploy
```

---

## Module Structure

```
src/
├── main.ts                     # Bootstrap (CORS, validation, cookies)
├── app.module.ts               # Root module
├── auth/                       # Google OAuth + JWT
│   ├── auth.controller.ts      # /auth/google, /auth/session, /auth/logout
│   ├── auth.service.ts         # findOrCreateUser, validateUser
│   ├── google.strategy.ts      # Passport Google OAuth
│   ├── jwt.strategy.ts         # Passport JWT validation
│   ├── jwt-auth.guard.ts       # Guard for protected routes
│   └── current-user.decorator.ts  # @CurrentUser() decorator
├── profile/                    # User profile
│   ├── profile.controller.ts   # GET/PUT /v1/me
│   ├── profile.service.ts      # getProfile, updateProfile
│   └── update-profile.dto.ts   # Validation DTO
├── rounds/                     # Golf rounds
│   ├── rounds.controller.ts    # CRUD /v1/rounds
│   ├── rounds.service.ts       # Business logic
│   └── dto/                    # create-round.dto.ts, update-round.dto.ts
├── courses/                    # Course management
├── prisma/                     # Database (Global module)
│   └── prisma.service.ts       # Extends PrismaClient
└── audit-log/                  # Action logging
```

---

## API Endpoints

### Authentication (Public)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/auth/google` | Start OAuth flow |
| GET | `/auth/google/redirect` | OAuth callback |
| GET | `/auth/session` | Check login status |
| GET | `/auth/logout` | Clear session |

### Profile (Requires JWT)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/me` | Get user + player profile |
| PUT | `/v1/me` | Update player profile |

### Rounds (Requires JWT)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/rounds` | List player's rounds |
| POST | `/v1/rounds` | Create round |
| PUT | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Update round |
| DELETE | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Soft delete round |

### Courses

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/courses` | List/search courses |
| GET | `/v1/courses/:id` | Get course details |
| GET | `/v1/courses/search` | Search by name |

---

## Database Schema

### Model Relationships

```
User (OAuth identity)
  └── 1:1 Player (golf profile)
           └── 1:N Round
                     └── N:1 Course (optional)

Role ←─ N:N ─→ User (via UserRole)
AuditLog (standalone)
```

### Key Fields

| Model | Key Fields |
|-------|------------|
| User | email, provider, providerId, avatarUrl, lastLoginAt |
| Player | firstName, lastName, ghinNumber, handicap |
| Round | strokes, front9, back9, girPct, firPct, totalPutts, birdies, pars, bogeys |
| Course | name, city, state, totalPar, courseRating, slopeRating, apiCourseId |

---

## Authentication Flow

```
1. Frontend → GET /auth/google
2. Redirect to Google consent
3. Google → /auth/google/redirect with code
4. GoogleStrategy exchanges code for user info
5. auth.service.findOrCreateUser() → User + Player
6. Sign JWT, set lg_jwt cookie (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=None, 7 days)
7. Redirect to frontend success page
```

### Cookie Config

```typescript
{
  httpOnly: true,        // XSS protection
  secure: true,          // HTTPS only (production)
  sameSite: 'none',      // Cross-origin allowed
  maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,  // 7 days
}
```

### Protecting Routes

```typescript
@Get('protected-route')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
async myRoute(@CurrentUser() user: any) {
  // user contains JWT payload
}
```

---

## Adding a New Endpoint

```typescript
// 1. Add DTO (src/[module]/dto/[action].dto.ts)
export class CreateThingDto {
  @IsString()
  @IsNotEmpty()
  name: string;
}

// 2. Add service method
async createThing(playerId: string, dto: CreateThingDto) {
  return this.prisma.thing.create({
    data: { ...dto, playerId },
  });
}

// 3. Add controller route
@Post()
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
async create(
  @Body() dto: CreateThingDto,
  @CurrentUser() user: any,
) {
  const profile = await this.profileService.getProfile(user.id);
  return this.thingService.createThing(profile.player.id, dto);
}

// 4. Write tests and run
npm run test
```

---

## Updating Prisma Schema

```bash
# 1. Edit prisma/schema.prisma
# 2. Format
npx prisma format

# 3. Create migration
npx prisma migrate dev --name add_thing_field

# 4. Regenerate client
npx prisma generate

# 5. Update DTOs and services

# 6. Test
npm run test
```

---

## Environment Variables

```ini
PORT=3000
NODE_ENV=development
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
DIRECT_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
JWT_SECRET=<openssl rand -base64 32>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=<from-google-console>.apps.googleusercontent.com
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=GOCSPX-<from-google-console>
GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/redirect
```

---

## CORS Configuration

Location: `src/main.ts`

```typescript
origin: [
  'https://lazygolfing.com',
  'https://www.lazygolfing.com',
  'https://lazygolfing-com.pages.dev',
  // Add for local dev: 'http://localhost:8080',
]
```

---

## Validation Rules (DTOs)

### Profile (update-profile.dto.ts)
- `firstName`: 1-50 chars
- `lastName`: 1-50 chars
- `ghinNumber`: 7 digits (string)
- `handicap`: 0-54 (float)

### Round (create-round.dto.ts)
- `courseName`: 1-100 chars (required)
- `strokes`: positive integer (required)
- `date`: ISO 8601 datetime (optional)
- `notes`: max 500 chars (optional)

---

## Debugging

```bash
# Check logs
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100

# Test endpoints
curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/
curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/auth/session
curl -H "Cookie: lg_jwt=..." http://192.168.1.40:3000/v1/me

# Production
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session
```

### Common Issues

| Symptom | Cause | Solution |
|---------|-------|----------|
| `Prisma Client not found` | Schema changed | `npx prisma generate` |
| Migration failed | DB not running | Check PostgreSQL status |
| 401 Unauthorized | Invalid JWT | Check cookie, re-login |
| CORS error | Origin not allowed | Add to main.ts allowlist |
| 500 Internal Server Error | Uncaught exception | Check PM2 logs |

---

## Deployment

```bash
# 1. SSH to VM
# 2. Pull latest code
git pull origin main

# 3. Install dependencies
npm ci

# 4. Run migrations
npx prisma migrate deploy

# 5. Rebuild
npm run build

# 6. Restart PM2
pm2 restart lg-api

# 7. Verify
curl http://localhost:3000/
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 20
```

### PM2 Config (ecosystem.config.js)

```javascript
{
  name: 'lg-api',
  script: 'dist/src/main.js',
  instances: 1,
  exec_mode: 'fork',
  autorestart: true,
  max_restarts: 25,
  max_memory_restart: '300M',
}
```

---

## Security Checklist

Before deploying new endpoints:
- [ ] Uses `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)` if protected
- [ ] Input validated with class-validator DTOs
- [ ] User can only access their own data
- [ ] Sensitive data filtered from responses
- [ ] No secrets in code or logs

---

*For root-level documentation, see [/CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)*
*For frontend documentation, see [/lzg.home/CLAUDE.md](../lzg.home/CLAUDE.md)*

# CLAUDE.md - Backend (lzg.backend)

> AI assistant guidelines for the NestJS API backend

**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06

---

## Quick Reference

### Environment

- **Code editing:** Windows machine (this repo)
- **Runtime:** Ubuntu VM at `192.168.1.40`
- **Production:** https://api.lazygolfing.com

### Essential Commands (Run on VM)

```bash
# Development
npm run start:dev               # Hot-reload server
npm run start:debug             # Debug mode (port 9229)
npm run test                    # Unit tests
npm run lint                    # ESLint

# Database
npx prisma generate             # REQUIRED after schema changes
npx prisma migrate dev --name <name>  # Create migration
npx prisma studio               # GUI at 192.168.1.40:5555

# Production
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100     # View logs
pm2 restart lg-api              # After deploy
```

---

## Module Structure

```

├── main.ts                     # Bootstrap (CORS, validation, cookies)

│   ├── jwt.strategy.ts         # Passport JWT validation
│   ├── jwt-auth.guard.ts       # Guard for protected routes
│   └── current-user.decorator.ts  # @CurrentUser() decorator
├── profile/                    # User profile
│   ├── profile.controller.ts   # GET/PUT /v1/me

│   └── dto/                    # create-round.dto.ts, update-round.dto.ts
├── courses/                    # Course management
├── prisma/                     # Database (Global module)

### Profile (Requires JWT)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|

## API Endpoints

### Authentication (Public)

| Method | Path | Guard | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/auth/google` | Google OAuth | Start OAuth flow |
| GET | `/auth/google/redirect` | Google OAuth | OAuth callback |
| GET | `/auth/session` | None | Check login status |
| POST | `/auth/logout` | CSRF | Clear session |

### Profile (Requires JWT + CSRF)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/me` | Get user + player profile |
| PUT | `/v1/me` | Update player profile |
| GET | `/v1/me/stats` | Get user statistics |
| GET | `/v1/me/playing-partners` | Get aggregated partners |
| GET | `/v1/me/export` | GDPR data export |
| DELETE | `/v1/me` | Delete account (cascade) |

### Rounds (Requires JWT + CSRF)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/rounds` | List player's rounds (paginated) |
| POST | `/v1/rounds` | Create round |
| PUT | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Update round |
| DELETE | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Soft delete round |
| POST | `/v1/rounds/import-csv` | Bulk import rounds |
| GET | `/v1/rounds/:id/suggestions` | Find playing partner matches |
| POST | `/v1/rounds/:id/link/:targetId` | Link two rounds |
| GET | `/v1/rounds/:id/linked` | Get linked rounds |

### Courses

| Method | Path | Guard | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/courses/search` | None | Search by name (+ API) |
| GET | `/v1/courses/nearby` | None | GPS-based search |
| GET | `/v1/courses` | None | List all courses |
| GET | `/v1/courses/:id` | None | Course details + stats |
| POST | `/v1/courses` | JWT+CSRF | Create course |
| POST | `/v1/courses/import` | JWT+CSRF | Import from Golf API |
| PUT | `/v1/courses/:id` | JWT+CSRF+Admin | Update course |
| DELETE | `/v1/courses/:id` | JWT+CSRF+Admin | Delete course |

# CLAUDE.md - Backend (lzg.backend)

> AI assistant guidelines for the NestJS API backend

**Last Updated:** 2025-12-06

---

## Quick Reference

### Environment

- **Code editing:** Windows machine (this repo)
- **Runtime:** Ubuntu VM at `192.168.1.40`
- **Production:** https://api.lazygolfing.com

### Essential Commands (Run on VM)

```bash
# Development
npm run start:dev               # Hot-reload server
npm run start:debug             # Debug mode (port 9229)
npm run test                    # Unit tests
npm run lint                    # ESLint

# Database
npx prisma generate             # REQUIRED after schema changes
npx prisma migrate dev --name <name>  # Create migration
npx prisma studio               # GUI at 192.168.1.40:5555

# Production
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100     # View logs
pm2 restart lg-api              # After deploy
```

---

## Module Structure

```
src/
├── main.ts                     # Bootstrap (CORS, Helmet, validation, cookies)
├── app.module.ts               # Root module + ThrottlerModule
├── config/
│   └── env.validation.ts       # Environment variable validation
├── auth/                       # Google OAuth + JWT + CSRF
│   ├── auth.controller.ts      # /auth/google, /auth/session, /auth/logout
│   ├── auth.service.ts         # findOrCreateUser, validateUser, ensureRoles
│   ├── google.strategy.ts      # Passport Google OAuth
│   ├── jwt.strategy.ts         # Passport JWT validation
│   ├── jwt-auth.guard.ts       # Guard for protected routes
│   ├── admin.guard.ts          # Guard for admin-only routes
│   ├── csrf.guard.ts           # CSRF double-submit protection
│   ├── csrf.util.ts            # CSRF token generation
│   └── current-user.decorator.ts  # @CurrentUser() decorator
├── profile/                    # User profile + stats
│   ├── profile.controller.ts   # GET/PUT /v1/me, /v1/me/stats, /v1/me/export
│   ├── profile.service.ts      # getProfile, updateProfile, getStats, export
│   └── update-profile.dto.ts   # Validation DTO
├── rounds/                     # Golf rounds + linking
│   ├── rounds.controller.ts    # CRUD /v1/rounds + link endpoints
│   ├── rounds.service.ts       # Business logic + partner matching
│   └── dto/                    # create-round.dto.ts, update-round.dto.ts, import-csv.dto.ts
├── courses/                    # Course management + Golf API
│   ├── courses.controller.ts   # Search, nearby, CRUD
│   ├── courses.service.ts      # Search, API integration, Haversine
│   └── dto/                    # create-course.dto.ts, update-course.dto.ts
├── prisma/                     # Database (Global module)
│   └── prisma.service.ts       # Extends PrismaClient
└── audit-log/                  # Action logging
    ├── audit-log.module.ts     # Module definition
    └── audit-log.service.ts    # log(), getUserLogs(), cleanup()
```

---

## API Endpoints

### Authentication (Public)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/auth/google` | Start OAuth flow |
| GET | `/auth/google/redirect` | OAuth callback |
| GET | `/auth/session` | Check login status |
| GET | `/auth/logout` | Clear session |

### Profile (Requires JWT)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/me` | Get user + player profile |
| PUT | `/v1/me` | Update player profile |

### Rounds (Requires JWT)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/rounds` | List player's rounds |
| POST | `/v1/rounds` | Create round |
| PUT | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Update round |
| DELETE | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Soft delete round |

### Courses

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/courses` | List/search courses |
| GET | `/v1/courses/:id` | Get course details |
| GET | `/v1/courses/search` | Search by name |

---

## Database Schema

### Model Relationships

```
User (OAuth identity)
  └── 1:1 Player (golf profile)
           └── 1:N Round
                     └── N:1 Course (optional)

Role ←─ N:N ─→ User (via UserRole)
AuditLog (standalone)
```

### Key Fields

| Model | Key Fields |
|-------|------------|
| User | email, provider, providerId, avatarUrl, lastLoginAt |
| Player | firstName, lastName, ghinNumber, handicap |
| Round | strokes, front9, back9, girPct, firPct, totalPutts, birdies, pars, bogeys |
| Course | name, city, state, totalPar, courseRating, slopeRating, apiCourseId |

---

## Authentication Flow

```
1. Frontend → GET /auth/google
2. Redirect to Google consent
3. Google → /auth/google/redirect with code
4. GoogleStrategy exchanges code for user info
5. auth.service.findOrCreateUser() → User + Player
6. Sign JWT, set lg_jwt cookie (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=None, 7 days)
7. Redirect to frontend success page
```

### Cookie Config

```typescript
{
  httpOnly: true,        // XSS protection
  secure: true,          // HTTPS only (production)
  sameSite: 'none',      // Cross-origin allowed
  maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,  // 7 days
}
```

### Protecting Routes

```typescript
@Get('protected-route')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
async myRoute(@CurrentUser() user: any) {
  // user contains JWT payload
}
```

---

## Adding a New Endpoint

```typescript
// 1. Add DTO (src/[module]/dto/[action].dto.ts)
export class CreateThingDto {
  @IsString()
  @IsNotEmpty()
  name: string;
}

// 2. Add service method
async createThing(playerId: string, dto: CreateThingDto) {
  return this.prisma.thing.create({
    data: { ...dto, playerId },
  });
}

// 3. Add controller route
@Post()
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
async create(
  @Body() dto: CreateThingDto,
  @CurrentUser() user: any,
) {
  const profile = await this.profileService.getProfile(user.id);
  return this.thingService.createThing(profile.player.id, dto);
}

// 4. Write tests and run
npm run test
```

---

## Updating Prisma Schema

```bash
# 1. Edit prisma/schema.prisma
# 2. Format
npx prisma format

# 3. Create migration
npx prisma migrate dev --name add_thing_field

# 4. Regenerate client
npx prisma generate

# 5. Update DTOs and services

# 6. Test
npm run test
```

---

## Environment Variables

```ini
PORT=3000
NODE_ENV=development
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
DIRECT_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
JWT_SECRET=<openssl rand -base64 32>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=<from-google-console>.apps.googleusercontent.com
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=GOCSPX-<from-google-console>
GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/redirect
```

---

## CORS Configuration

Location: `src/main.ts`

```typescript
origin: [
  'https://lazygolfing.com',
  'https://www.lazygolfing.com',
  'https://lazygolfing-com.pages.dev',
  // Add for local dev: 'http://localhost:8080',
]
```

---

## Validation Rules (DTOs)

### Profile (update-profile.dto.ts)
- `firstName`: 1-50 chars
- `lastName`: 1-50 chars
- `ghinNumber`: 7 digits (string)
- `handicap`: 0-54 (float)

### Round (create-round.dto.ts)
- `courseName`: 1-100 chars (required)
- `strokes`: positive integer (required)
- `date`: ISO 8601 datetime (optional)
- `notes`: max 500 chars (optional)

---

## Debugging

```bash
# Check logs
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100

# Test endpoints
curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/
curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/auth/session
curl -H "Cookie: lg_jwt=..." http://192.168.1.40:3000/v1/me

# Production
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session
```

### Common Issues

| Symptom | Cause | Solution |
|---------|-------|----------|
| `Prisma Client not found` | Schema changed | `npx prisma generate` |
| Migration failed | DB not running | Check PostgreSQL status |
| 401 Unauthorized | Invalid JWT | Check cookie, re-login |
| CORS error | Origin not allowed | Add to main.ts allowlist |
| 500 Internal Server Error | Uncaught exception | Check PM2 logs |

---

## Deployment

```bash
# 1. SSH to VM
# 2. Pull latest code
git pull origin main

# 3. Install dependencies
npm ci

# 4. Run migrations
npx prisma migrate deploy

# 5. Rebuild
npm run build

# 6. Restart PM2
pm2 restart lg-api

# 7. Verify
curl http://localhost:3000/
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 20
```

### PM2 Config (ecosystem.config.js)

```javascript
{
  name: 'lg-api',
  script: 'dist/src/main.js',
  instances: 1,
  exec_mode: 'fork',
  autorestart: true,
  max_restarts: 25,
  max_memory_restart: '300M',
}
```

---

## Security Checklist

Before deploying new endpoints:
- [ ] Uses `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)` if protected
- [ ] Input validated with class-validator DTOs
- [ ] User can only access their own data
- [ ] Sensitive data filtered from responses
- [ ] No secrets in code or logs

---

*For root-level documentation, see [/CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)*
*For frontend documentation, see [/lzg.home/CLAUDE.md](../lzg.home/CLAUDE.md)*

+| GET | `/v1/courses/search` | None | Search by name (+ API) |
+| POST | `/v1/courses/import` | JWT+CSRF | Import from Golf API |

   195→## CSRF Protection
   196→
   197→### Double-Submit Cookie Pattern
   198→
   199→Protected endpoints require the `X-CSRF-Token` header to match the `csrf_token` cookie.
   200→
   201→**Cookie:** Set at login alongside `lg_jwt`
   202→**Header:** `X-CSRF-Token: <token-value>`
   203→**Validation:** Constant-time comparison (prevents timing attacks)
   204→
   205→```typescript
   206→// Frontend request example
   207→fetch('/v1/me', {
   208→  credentials: 'include',  // Include cookies
   209→  headers: {
   210→    'X-CSRF-Token': getCookie('csrf_token')
   211→  }
   212→});
   213→```
   214→
   215→**Skip for:** GET, HEAD, OPTIONS requests
   216→
   217→---
   218→
   219→## Rate Limiting
   220→
   221→Global rate limiting via `@nestjs/throttler`:
   222→
   223→| Category | Limit | Window |
   224→|----------|-------|--------|
   225→| Default | 120 requests | 1 minute |
   226→| Auth endpoints | 20 requests | 1 minute |
   227→| Session check | 20 requests | 1 minute |
   228→
   229→**Response when exceeded:** `429 Too Many Requests`

    └── audit-log.service.ts    # log(), getUserLogs(), cleanup()
```

---

## API Endpoints

### Authentication (Public)

| Method | Path | Guard | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/auth/google` | Google OAuth | Start OAuth flow |
| GET | `/auth/google/redirect` | Google OAuth | OAuth callback |
| GET | `/auth/session` | None | Check login status |
| POST | `/auth/logout` | CSRF | Clear session |

### Profile (Requires JWT + CSRF)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/me` | Get user + player profile |
| PUT | `/v1/me` | Update player profile |
| GET | `/v1/me/stats` | Get user statistics |
| GET | `/v1/me/playing-partners` | Get aggregated partners |
| GET | `/v1/me/export` | GDPR data export |
| DELETE | `/v1/me` | Delete account (cascade) |

### Rounds (Requires JWT + CSRF)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/rounds` | List player's rounds (paginated) |
| POST | `/v1/rounds` | Create round |
| PUT | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Update round |
| DELETE | `/v1/rounds/:id` | Soft delete round |
| POST | `/v1/rounds/import-csv` | Bulk import rounds |
| GET | `/v1/rounds/:id/suggestions` | Find playing partner matches |
| POST | `/v1/rounds/:id/link/:targetId` | Link two rounds |
| GET | `/v1/rounds/:id/linked` | Get linked rounds |

### Courses

| Method | Path | Guard | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| GET | `/v1/courses/search` | None | Search by name (+ API) |
| GET | `/v1/courses/nearby` | None | GPS-based search |
| GET | `/v1/courses` | None | List all courses |
| GET | `/v1/courses/:id` | None | Course details + stats |
| POST | `/v1/courses` | JWT+CSRF | Create course |
| POST | `/v1/courses/import` | JWT+CSRF | Import from Golf API |
| PUT | `/v1/courses/:id` | JWT+CSRF+Admin | Update course |
| DELETE | `/v1/courses/:id` | JWT+CSRF+Admin | Delete course |

---

## Database Schema

### Model Relationships

```
User (OAuth identity)
  └── 1:1 Player (golf profile)
           └── 1:N Round
                     └── N:1 Course (optional)

Role ←─ N:N ─→ User (via UserRole)
AuditLog (standalone)
```

### Key Fields

| Model | Key Fields |
|-------|------------|
| User | email, provider, providerId, avatarUrl, lastLoginAt |
| Player | firstName, lastName, ghinNumber, handicap |
| Round | strokes, front9, back9, girPct, firPct, totalPutts, birdies, pars, bogeys |
| Course | name, city, state, totalPar, courseRating, slopeRating, apiCourseId |

---

## Authentication Flow

```
1. Frontend → GET /auth/google
2. Redirect to Google consent
3. Google → /auth/google/redirect with code
4. GoogleStrategy exchanges code for user info
5. auth.service.findOrCreateUser() → User + Player
6. Sign JWT, set lg_jwt cookie (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=None, 7 days)
7. Redirect to frontend success page
```

### Cookie Config

```typescript
{
  httpOnly: true,        // XSS protection
  secure: true,          // HTTPS only (production)
  sameSite: 'none',      // Cross-origin allowed
  maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,  // 7 days
}
```

### Protecting Routes

```typescript
@Get('protected-route')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
async myRoute(@CurrentUser() user: any) {
  // user contains JWT payload
}
```

---

## Adding a New Endpoint

```typescript
// 1. Add DTO (src/[module]/dto/[action].dto.ts)
export class CreateThingDto {
  @IsString()
  @IsNotEmpty()
  name: string;
}

// 2. Add service method
async createThing(playerId: string, dto: CreateThingDto) {
  return this.prisma.thing.create({
    data: { ...dto, playerId },
  });
}

// 3. Add controller route
@Post()
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
async create(
  @Body() dto: CreateThingDto,
  @CurrentUser() user: any,
) {
  const profile = await this.profileService.getProfile(user.id);
  return this.thingService.createThing(profile.player.id, dto);
}

// 4. Write tests and run
npm run test
```

---

## Updating Prisma Schema

```bash
# 1. Edit prisma/schema.prisma
# 2. Format
npx prisma format

# 3. Create migration
npx prisma migrate dev --name add_thing_field

# 4. Regenerate client
npx prisma generate

# 5. Update DTOs and services

# 6. Test
npm run test
```

---

## Environment Variables

```ini
PORT=3000
NODE_ENV=development
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
DIRECT_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/lazygolfing
JWT_SECRET=<openssl rand -base64 32>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=<from-google-console>.apps.googleusercontent.com
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=GOCSPX-<from-google-console>
GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/redirect
```

---

## CORS Configuration

Location: `src/main.ts`

```typescript
origin: [
  'https://lazygolfing.com',
  'https://www.lazygolfing.com',
  'https://lazygolfing-com.pages.dev',
  // Add for local dev: 'http://localhost:8080',
]
```

---

## Validation Rules (DTOs)

### Profile (update-profile.dto.ts)
- `firstName`: 1-50 chars
- `lastName`: 1-50 chars
- `ghinNumber`: 7 digits (string)
- `handicap`: 0-54 (float)

### Round (create-round.dto.ts)
- `courseName`: 1-100 chars (required)
- `strokes`: positive integer (required)
- `date`: ISO 8601 datetime (optional)
- `notes`: max 500 chars (optional)

---

## Debugging

```bash
# Check logs
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 100

# Test endpoints
curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/
curl http://192.168.1.40:3000/auth/session
curl -H "Cookie: lg_jwt=..." http://192.168.1.40:3000/v1/me

# Production
curl https://api.lazygolfing.com/auth/session
```

### Common Issues

| Symptom | Cause | Solution |
|---------|-------|----------|
| `Prisma Client not found` | Schema changed | `npx prisma generate` |
| Migration failed | DB not running | Check PostgreSQL status |
| 401 Unauthorized | Invalid JWT | Check cookie, re-login |
| CORS error | Origin not allowed | Add to main.ts allowlist |
| 500 Internal Server Error | Uncaught exception | Check PM2 logs |

---

## Deployment

```bash
# 1. SSH to VM
# 2. Pull latest code
git pull origin main

# 3. Install dependencies
npm ci

# 4. Run migrations
npx prisma migrate deploy

# 5. Rebuild
npm run build

# 6. Restart PM2
pm2 restart lg-api

# 7. Verify
curl http://localhost:3000/
pm2 logs lg-api --lines 20
```

### PM2 Config (ecosystem.config.js)

```javascript
{
  name: 'lg-api',
  script: 'dist/src/main.js',
  instances: 1,
  exec_mode: 'fork',
  autorestart: true,
  max_restarts: 25,
  max_memory_restart: '300M',
}
```

---

## Security Checklist

Before deploying new endpoints:
- [ ] Uses `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)` if protected
- [ ] Input validated with class-validator DTOs
- [ ] User can only access their own data
- [ ] Sensitive data filtered from responses
- [ ] No secrets in code or logs

---

*For root-level documentation, see [/CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)*
*For frontend documentation, see [/lzg.home/CLAUDE.md](../lzg.home/CLAUDE.md)*

## Validation Rules (DTOs)

### Profile (update-profile.dto.ts)

| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `firstName` | string | Optional, 1-50 chars |
| `lastName` | string | Optional, 1-50 chars |
| `ghinNumber` | string | Optional, empty → null |
| `handicap` | number/null | Optional, -10 to 54 |

### Round (create-round.dto.ts)

| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `courseId` | string | Optional, UUID FK to Course |
| `courseName` | string | Optional, max 100 chars |
| `strokes` | number | **Required**, 18-200 |
| `front9` | number | Optional, 9-100 |
| `back9` | number | Optional, 9-100 |
| `playingPartners` | string | Optional, CSV names |
| `date` | string | Optional, ISO date |
| `teeTime` | string | Optional, ISO datetime |
| `latitude` | number | Optional, -90 to 90 |
| `longitude` | number | Optional, -180 to 180 |
| `notes` | string | Optional, max 500 chars |

### Advanced Round Stats (all optional)

| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `girPct` | number | 0-100 (Greens in Regulation %) |
| `firPct` | number | 0-100 (Fairways in Regulation %) |
| `approachPct` | number | 0-100 |
| `front9Putts` | number | 0-50 |
| `back9Putts` | number | 0-50 |
| `totalPutts` | number | 0-100 |
| `holeInOnes` | number | 0+ |
| `eagles` | number | 0+ |
| `birdies` | number | 0+ |
| `pars` | number | 0+ |
| `bogeys` | number | 0+ |
| `doubleBogeys` | number | 0+ |
| `triplePlusBogeys` | number | 0+ |

### Course (create-course.dto.ts)

| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | **Required** |
| `city` | string | Optional |
| `state` | string | Optional |
| `country` | string | Optional |
| `totalPar` | number | Optional |
| `courseRating` | number | Optional |
| `slopeRating` | number | Optional |
